title: Project Coordinator Painting Company | Please include audio or video in the application introducing yourself
description:
Project Coordinator (Remote – Full Time) | Growing Painting Company (Canada)



About Us

We are a fast-growing residential painting company based in Canada, focused on delivering high-quality work and a smooth customer experience. We are building a strong operations team to support growth, streamline projects, and eliminate bottlenecks.



We are looking for a reliable, proactive Project Coordinator who can take ownership of day-to-day operations and help us scale.



Role Overview



You will be the bridge between sales, clients, and painting crews. Your job is to ensure every project runs smoothly from start to finish.



This is not just an assistant role. We are looking for someone who can think, organize, and take initiative.



Responsibilities



Coordinate schedules between clients, sales team, and painters



Manage project timelines and ensure deadlines are met



Communicate with clients before, during, and after projects



Handle job updates, confirmations, and follow-ups



Prevent scheduling conflicts and production delays



Organize job details, notes, and internal systems



Work closely with VAs, sales reps, and crew members



Help improve workflows and internal processes



Track progress and flag issues before they become problems



Requirements



Strong English communication (written and spoken)



Experience in project coordination, operations, or administrative roles



Highly organized and detail-oriented



Ability to multitask and manage multiple projects at once



Problem-solving mindset, not just task execution



Comfortable using tools such as:



Google Workspace



CRM systems (or willing to learn)



Scheduling tools



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with construction, painting, or home services



Experience coordinating remote teams



Familiarity with job scheduling or dispatching



Experience improving workflows or systems



Schedule



Full-time (40 hours per week)



Must overlap with Eastern Time (Canada) for communication



Compensation



We are looking for the right long-term fit.

Please include your expected monthly salary in your application.



Growth Opportunity



This role has the potential to grow into an Operations Manager position as the company scales. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term.



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



A short introduction about yourself



Your experience with coordination or operations



An example of how you handled a scheduling or project issue



Your expected monthly salary



The word “PAINT” in your application so we know you read everything



If you want, I can also tighten this further to attract higher-quality applicants only or make a version that filters out low performers automatically.

title: Video Editor - Meta Ads
description:
We partner with medical practices and doctors to build dominant digital presences through strategic content and paid advertising. We capture high-quality video content in quarterly shoots and transform that raw footage into organic posts and high-converting video ads that position our clients as the leading authorities in their medical markets. We’re now expanding our team to meet growing demand. I’m looking for an absolute expert in video editing.



Role & Responsibilities

As our Video Editor, your main responsibilities will include:

- Reviewing and organizing hours of footage

- Adding B-roll, subtitles, and appropriate music to talking head videos

- Editing multiple short-form reels for Meta ads and organic content

- Creating eye-catching, scroll-stopping content

- Managing multiple projects while meeting deadlines

- Proficiency in CapCut Pro and Adobe Suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator)

- Working with a reliable internet connection and a computer capable of handling video editing software

- Comfortable communicating and collaborating through Asana and Slack





What We’re Looking For

You should have:

- Advanced English language skills

- An upbeat, helpful attitude

- 100% honesty and transparency

- Attention to detail (e.g., include your zodiac sign in the subject line!)

- Advanced knowledge of hooks and viral video techniques

- Advanced understanding of Meta ads

- Optional but valuable: Graphic design skills (thumbnails, social media graphics, motion graphics)

- If you cannot commit to daily output of 5–10 videos, please do not apply.



What We Value Most

- Good taste in design and content

- Timeliness and reliability

- Honesty and integrity

- Continuous desire to improve

- Asking questions and seeking clarification when needed

- Ability to follow step-by-step instructions

 A self-starter mindset and fearlessness in learning and helping



Work Schedule

- 5 videos edited per day

- Flexible hours; we care about quality and turnaround



Why Join Us?

You’ll be on the ground floor of helping our clients grow amazing businesses. Having had challenging bosses in the past, I’ve dedicated my career to creating a respectful, supportive, and growth-focused environment. You’ll be highly valued, and together, we’ll push each other to improve. We’re excited to work with someone who is as passionate about video editing and digital marketing as we are!



How to Apply

Please send the following when applying:

1. Your portfolio showcasing your video editing work, including reels, ads, and social media videos

2. Your resume, with references if possible

3. The completed Test Assignment (provided separately)

title: Dental Virtual Assistant - Urgent Hiring
description:
Position: Dental Virtual Assistant – Patient Engagement & Access

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Part-time (20–40 hours) or Full-time



Key Responsibilities

* Have previous dental work preferably booking appointments through marketing leads

* Conduct patient intake, collect clinical and administrative information, and guide patients through onboarding processes.

* Manage appointment scheduling, confirmations, reminders, and follow-ups.

* Assist with insurance verification, authorizations, and administrative support for clinical teams.

* Maintain HIPAA-compliant documentation in EHR, CRM, and other systems.

* Responsible to call new leads within minutes of receiving a notification to ensure immediate follow-up. Would be great if they have GoHighLevel experience (bonus)



Requirements

* Minimum 2 years of experience in medical offices, patient access, virtual assistance, or healthcare operations.

* Medical or social service professional background preferred (Nurses, Social Workers, Behavioral Health Specialists, Psychometricians, Psychologists, and other social service practitioners encouraged).

* Excellent English communication skills with professional phone presence; prior experience calling medical offices, healthcare settings, or handling B2B outbound calls.

* Communicate with patients via phone, text, and
 in a professional manner before and after appointments

* Detail check: At the top of your
 or in the subject line, answer this: What is your zodiac sign? in your application so we know you read this.

* Support general administrative and front-office tasks as needed

* Knowledge of dental coding (CPT, CDT) and HIPAA regulations

* Proficient in dental practice management software (e.g., Dentrix, Eaglesoft, etc.) and insurance portals.

* Reliable home office setup (quiet environment, PC, headset, high-speed internet) and ability to work during U.S. daytime hours.



Work Schedule

* Part-time (20–40 hours/week) or full-time remote work.

* Must be available during U.S. daytime hours.



Experience working in a dental office is a BIG PLUS



Examples of past experience that would be ideal:

• Dental assistant

• Dental treatment coordinator

• Dental office manager

• Dental insurance coordinator



How to Apply

Submit your resume and a brief cover letter highlighting your experience in patient engagement, scheduling, and professional outreach.

Including a short video clip explaining why you would be a great fit for this role is optional but appreciated.

title: HVAC Dispatcher Virtual Assistant (3–5 Years Experience Required)
description:
We are a family-owned HVAC company serving Los Angeles, California for over 16 years.



We are looking for an experienced HVAC Dispatcher Virtual Assistant to manage scheduling, customer communication, and technician coordination.



*** This is NOT an entry-level position.

You must have real dispatching experience managing service technicians.



You will be responsible for keeping our daily operations organized, ensuring technicians are efficiently scheduled, and providing excellent customer service.



Responsibilities



- Answer incoming calls and respond to customer inquiries

- Schedule and confirm service appointments

- Dispatch 3–10+ technicians daily

- Manage technician schedules in real-time

- Optimize routes to reduce travel time and increase efficiency

- Handle schedule changes, delays, and emergency calls

- Communicate with technicians throughout the day

- Update customer records and job details

- Follow up with customers and confirm appointments



Required Experience



Minimum 3–5 years of dispatch experience (REQUIRED)



Must have experience dispatching field service technicians (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, etc.)



Must have managed multiple technicians at once (3 or more daily)



Must have experience handling real-time scheduling and route optimization



Skills



Excellent English (written and spoken)



Strong customer service skills



Highly organized and detail-oriented



Ability to multitask and work under pressure



Strong problem-solving skills



Technical Requirements

Quiet work environment



Computer with good performance



Headset for calls



Preferred (Nice to Have)



Experience with Housecall Pro



Experience working with U.S. companies



HVAC or home service industry experience



Familiar with CRM tools



To apply, follow ALL instructions carefully:



Start your application with the phrase: BLUE AIR



Send your resume



Send a short voice recording introducing yourself



Answer the following questions:



How many technicians did you dispatch daily?

title: Production Manager / YouTube Producer (Med School Insiders) - FULL TIME
description:
Med School Insiders | 3 Channels | 2M+ Subscribers | Mission-Driven Team



Med School Insiders is hiring a YouTube Video Producer to transform recorded content—voiceovers, talking head footage, screen recordings—into polished, high-performing YouTube videos across our three channels: Med School Insiders, Kevin Jubbal, M.D., and Jubbal & Cars.



This is a production and operations-focused role, ideal for someone who thrives on structure, timeliness, and quality control. You’ll be responsible for ensuring every video is delivered on time, on brand, and without compromise—by coordinating with editors and animators, enforcing SOPs, running quality checks, and publishing content across platforms.



You’ll report directly to the CEO and work closely with the Director of Content to execute a shared creative vision. If you’re the kind of person who takes pride in smooth systems, loves checklist-driven consistency, and knows how to lead creatives without letting deadlines slip—you’ll thrive here.



---



Responsibilities



- Oversee the entire post-production process across 3+ YouTube channels and supporting platforms (Instagram, Vimeo, etc.)

- Manage a team of video editors and motion designers, ensuring timely execution and adherence to our quality standards

- Review drafts, give actionable feedback, and ensure final outputs match the creative brief, brand voice, and formatting guidelines

- Use checklists and SOPs to maintain consistent video quality, pacing, formatting, and technical specs across all content

- Handle video uploads and publishing: write metadata, optimize for SEO (title, tags, description), add end screens, playlists, and cards

- Run A/B tests (thumbnails, titles), monitor performance analytics, and coordinate improvements across the funnel

- Train new editors and animators on our systems and workflows, and help them use tools like **Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Powtoon**

- Stay current on YouTube best practices, algorithm changes, and platform tools (YouTube Studio, Vimeo, TubeBuddy, VidIQ)



---



Who You Are



- 3+ years producing and publishing content for YouTube or similar digital video platforms

- Strong project manager with proven ability to lead creatives and keep projects moving without delay

- Familiar with Adobe Creative Suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects), Powtoon, and remote collaboration tools (Google Drive, Notion, Slack)

- Detail-oriented and operationally minded—you rely on systems, SOPs, and checklists to ensure excellence every time

- Comfortable making judgment calls on quality: You know when a video is “good enough” and when it needs revision

- Clear communicator with strong organizational and time management skills

- Zero tolerance for missed deadlines or sloppy execution—you take full ownership of output



---



Bonus Points



- Familiarity with educational or professional development content

- Experience with short-form vertical video workflows (YouTube Shorts, Reels, TikTok)

- Experience training or onboarding editors and creatives into an existing video production pipeline

- Knowledge of animation pipelines using tools like Vyond, Powtoon, or Adobe Animate



---



What You’ll Get



- A high-impact role with direct access to the CEO and key leadership

- Remote flexibility and autonomy, with clear structure and performance expectations

- A chance to scale content that genuinely helps people—from premeds to physicians

- Opportunities for growth into team leadership or operations roles as we scale



---



How to Apply



Follow the instructions in this Google Form:



---



We are not looking for someone who just “keeps things moving.” We’re looking for someone who can enforce high standards, manage creatives, publish with precision, and keep a production calendar airtight. If you take pride in excellence and execution—and want to help millions of students and doctors through world-class content—apply now

About the role



This role does not come with a manager watching over your shoulder. You will own this function completely — and we mean that.



At Opulent Consulting Group, the Client Success Manager is not a support role. It is the operational backbone of our entire fulfillment process. You will manage active credit repair clients, direct the Disputer team, monitor the funding pipeline, and make real decisions every day — without being told to do any of it.



The CEO is not your scheduler, your reminder system, or your safety net. You will set the pace, identify what needs to happen, and execute. If something falls through the cracks, it falls on you — and you're the type of person who doesn't let that happen.

nt

ONBOARDING

CLIENT TOUCHPOINTS

title: Bankruptcy Paralegal (U.S. Law Firm – Chapter 7/11/13
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines) – Night Shift (Aligned with U.S. Eastern Time)

Company: Van Horn Law Group, P.A.



About Us:

Van Horn Law Group is one of the largest and fastest-growing bankruptcy law firms in the United States. We have helped more than 10,000 clients overcome financial challenges and rebuild their lives. Our practice focuses on Chapters 7, 11, and 13 bankruptcy, and we are known for combining compassion with results.



We are building a high-performance remote team and are looking for a Bankruptcy Paralegal who takes pride in accuracy, ownership, and moving cases forward efficiently. This is a long-term, career-track opportunity with clear growth potential.



Role Overview:

You will play a critical role in managing bankruptcy cases from intake through discharge. This position requires strong attention to detail, excellent communication skills, and the ability to manage multiple deadlines without supervision.



Key Responsibilities:



* Prepare and review bankruptcy petitions, schedules, and statements of financial affairs

* Draft routine motions, notices, and correspondence for attorney review

* Communicate with clients to collect required documents and missing information

* Track case deadlines, trustee requirements, and filing timelines

* Assist attorneys with hearing preparation, 341 meetings, and plan confirmations

* Review documents for accuracy and completeness before filing

* Maintain organized and accurate records in CRM and case management systems

* Proactively identify issues or delays and escalate when necessary



Success Metrics (KPIs):



* Cases prepared accurately and on time

* Reduction in filing errors and rework

* Timely follow-up with clients and document collection

* Meeting internal deadlines and trustee requirements

* Overall contribution to keeping cases moving efficiently



Qualifications:



* 2+ years of experience as a paralegal, legal assistant, or similar role

* Bankruptcy experience (Chapter 7, 11, or 13) strongly preferred

* Excellent written and spoken English

* Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

* Ability to manage multiple cases and deadlines independently

* Tech-savvy (Google Workspace, CRMs, case management systems)

* Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

* Highly responsive, proactive, and accountable



Schedule and Compensation:



* Full-time (40 hours per week)

* Training: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (first 2 weeks)

* Ongoing schedule: Aligned with EST (night shift PH)

* Compensation: $1,200 – $2,000 USD per month (based on experience and performance)

* Performance-based raises and advancement opportunities

* Clear path to Senior Paralegal and Team Lead roles



Why Join Us:



* Long-term, stable position with a growing U.S. law firm

* Opportunity to specialize in U.S. bankruptcy law

* Structured training and support

* Performance-based growth and promotion opportunities

* Be part of a mission-driven team helping clients get a fresh financial start



How to Apply:



Message us:



1. Why you want to work with Van Horn Law Group

2. Your experience with bankruptcy or legal work

3. Your availability in EST hours

4. A brief example of a task where attention to detail was critical

We are looking for a Direct Response Static & Video Ads Editor who understands how to create high-performing creatives for paid media campaigns.

This role goes beyond traditional design. You will work closely with the media buying team to develop static and video ads designed to drive leads, improve conversion rates, and scale profitable campaigns across platforms such as Meta and other paid channels.

You must be comfortable working in a fast-paced Pay Per Lead environment where creatives are constantly tested, improved, and iterated based on campaign data.

Creative Strategy & Research

Creative Development (Video & Static)

, TikTok, X etc.

- Create motion graphics, animated elements, and visual storytelling that drive quality CTR.

Creative Testing & Iteration

- Produce multiple creative variations for A/B testing.

- Refresh and scale winning creatives by producing new variations and iterations.

- Leverage AI to maximise creative outputs at scale.



Performance Optimisation

- Work closely with the media buying team to understand which creatives are driving results.

Workflow & Asset Management

title: Designer: Vehicle Wraps and Designs
description:
A vehicle wrap designer is a creative professional responsible for designing and creating graphics, logos, and other visual elements that are printed on vinyl wraps and then applied to cars, trucks, buses, and other types of vehicles. The primary role of a vehicle wrap designer is to work with clients to create visually appealing and effective designs that meet their branding and advertising needs. This requires a strong understanding of graphic design principles, as well as knowledge of the printing process and the ability to work with various design software.



Please send a link to the car designs that you've created in the past.

title: Signage Designer
description:
The sign designer will be responsible for creating visually appealing, effective signage designs, working closely with clients to understand their needs and develop concepts that meet their expectations. 



The ideal candidate for this position will have a strong portfolio, excellent communication skills, and a passion for design and creativity.

title: Remote Content Coordinator
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, organized, and creative Remote Content Coordinator to join our team. Since we operate in the fast-paced world of real estate investment, we need someone who can work independently from their home office to keep our brand polished and our back-end organized.



Real estate is all about trust. Your mission? Take complex market data and dry investment jargon and turn it into clear, punchy content that gets people excited to grow their wealth with us.



What You’ll Be Doing

Keeping Investors in the Loop: Owning our remote communication strategy—newsletters and market updates—so our investors always know exactly how their money is working for them.



Creating "Must-Read" Content: Researching and writing blogs and LinkedIn articles that break down trends like ROI and passive income.



Social Media Hype: Managing our company pages to show off our latest wins and keep our brand top-of-mind.



The "Digital Glue" (Admin): Keeping our team running smoothly—handling scheduling, organizing cloud-based files, and keeping our investor database (CRM) up to date.



A Bit of Bookkeeping: Tackling light data entry or tracking project expenses. You don't need to be a CPA, but you should be comfortable in a spreadsheet and have an eye for detail.



Staying Sharp: Double-checking the details. In this industry, accuracy is everything, so you’ll make sure our facts are straight and our marketing stays compliant.



ONLY APPLICATIONS SUBMITTED THROUGH OUR CAREER SITE WILL BE CONSIDERED.

title: Need a Next Level YouTube Editor
description:
— WHO WE ARE —…



We are a small group of friends looking to make our mark on the YouTube landscape, with our action-packed and humorous gameplay and challenges.



Check out our channel: 



— WHAT WE‘RE LOOKING FOR —



We’re looking for remote, highly experienced Video Editors who aspire to be the best YouTube editors in the world. Period.



If hired, you will spend the majority of your time editing and animating fast-paced, highly engaging YouTube videos (our style could be compared to Game Theory, MortarMarv, or Finzar).



Our team culture is always supportive and encouraging, but you should also expect to be held to an exceptionally high standard because that’s how we become the best in the world at what we do (If you hate getting lots of revisions/feedback on your work, you won’t fit in here).



Your day-to-day will also involve analyzing previous videos' Viewer Retention Analytics Graphs to uncover opportunities to improve future edits.



— THE IDEAL CANDIDATE —



Here are the main skills and abilities we’re looking for in our applicants:



VIDEO EDITING (Required): Obviously, you must be an exceptionally talented video editor from a technical perspective. However, you must also have the passion, creativity, and sense of humor to be able to turn bland, average footage into highly engaging videos that educate AND entertain viewers.



ANIMATION (Required): You must be capable of creating high-quality 2d overlay, titling, and keyframing animations that visually illustrate the concepts we discuss in our videos.



— YOUR KPIs —



Your performance will be graded using the following KPIs:



1 Good Audience Retention, which we’ll be able to measure and learn from through our YouTube analytics.



2 The number of revisions the videos you edit require before being finalised (the less, the better)



3 The number of hours it takes you to create a video (the less, the better)



— WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU —



Here are just some of the areas where you’ll have the opportunity to learn and grow at our channel.



STABLE & SECURE: This is a very stable and secure job. Our most senior editors have been working with us full-time for 3+ years. No more wishy-washy freelance gigs.



LEADERSHIP OPPORTUNITIES: If you prove yourself and we continue with our current growth rate, you will likely be presented with senior opportunities down the track.



LEARN FROM THE BEST IN THE WORLD: With us, you get to learn from people who are constantly striving to be the best in the world. We’re supportive and encouraging of one another, but we also hold each other to very high standards.



CREATIVE FREEDOM: Once you’ve mastered our style, we encourage outside-the-box thinking. We’re always open to experimenting with new techniques and styles, and then we analyze the data to see how viewers react.



FLEXIBLE WORK HOURS: You can work whenever you want within reason; however, we expect you to be available for tea
etings (We are based in California, and tea
etings are usually in the late evening PT).



— TO APPLY —



If you're interested, please submit the following form (No need for a CV or cover letter. It’s not the 1900s anymore :D):






Please note: All successful job applications will start with a virtual interview and trial project/s to make sure that we’re the right fit for each other.



Thank you for your consideration, and best of luck on your job search!

title: Ecom video editor
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



VERY Highly valued skill:

- AI: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Kling, Nano Banana

Candidates with this skill set will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The Big opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

“I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have AI experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you.

Speak soon, Karos

title: Shopify + Printify VA (Apparel Store Setup, Optimization, Product Management)
description:
Shopify + Printify VA (Apparel Store Setup, Optimization, Product Management)



**Overview:**

We are building a lifestyle apparel brand and are looking for a skilled Virtual Assistant to help organize, build, and optimize our Shopify store and Printify product catalog.



This is NOT a beginner role. You must already have experience with Shopify and Printify, including product setup, store organization, and basic conversion optimization.



We are looking for someone who can take direction but also think independently and improve what’s already in place.



**Responsibilities:**



**Printify Product Management**



* Upload and organize products inside Printify

* Update and apply artwork across multiple products (e.g., one design used across various product types)

* Write and optimize product titles and descriptions

* Ensure gender-specific designs are correctly matched to appropriate apparel (e.g., women’s designs on women’s products, men’s designs on men’s products)

* Manage variants (sizes, colors, SKUs)

* Ensure product consistency across listings



**Shopify Store Setup & Optimization**



* Build and organize Shopify store (collections, navigation, product pages)

* Optimize product pages for conversions (images, descriptions, layout)

* Create and organize product collections based on niche, theme, or target audience

* Set up apps and integrations as needed

* Improve overall store flow and user experience



**Pricing & Profit Optimization**



* Implement dynamic pricing strategies

* Ensure margins are maintained across products

* Adjust pricing based on product type and positioning



**Basic Design & Editing**



* Make simple edits to product images/mockups if needed

* Ensure branding consistency across store



---



**Requirements:**



* Experience with Shopify (REQUIRED)

* Experience with Printify or print-on-demand platforms

* Understanding of product organization and e-commerce structure

* Ability to write clean, simple product descriptions

* Detail-oriented and organized

* Good English communication



---



**Compensation: Performance-Based (Earn More by Working Efficiently)**



This is not an hourly role. Pay is structured around a $6/hour baseline, but tasks are paid at a fixed rate.



* Tasks are priced based on estimated time

* If you complete work faster, your effective hourly rate increases

* No time tracking or micromanaging

* Skilled tea
mbers can earn $8–$12+/hour equivalent



???? The faster and more efficient you are, the more you earn. No cap.



---



**What We’re Looking For:**



* Someone who works quickly and efficiently

* Someone who understands e-commerce, not just data entry

* Someone who can improve and organize, not just upload

* Someone who wants consistent, long-term work



---



**To Apply:**



Please include:



1. Shopify stores you’ve worked on

2. Printify or POD experience

3. Examples of product pages or listings you’ve created

4. A short message about your experience



**IMPORTANT:** Start your application with the word **STORE** so we know you read this.



---



**Interviews:**

We will begin conducting Zoom interviews on March 20 at 10:00 AM EST.



---



We are looking for someone long-term who can grow with the brand!

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (Contract) – Legal Tech Platform
description:
Senior Full-Stack Developer (Contract) – Legal Tech Platform

Remote – Contract (3–6 months, potential long-term role)



About Summerall Law

Summerall Law is a technology-forward estate planning firm building a new platform called Essential Estates.

Essential Estates aims to automate and simplify estate planning and trust administration while reducing legal complexity and cost for families. 

The platform will eventually power estate planning services for multiple law firms.



The Role

We are seeking a senior full-stack developer to work on a key platform initiative.

The first major project will be replacing the firm's current Formstack-based document generation system with an internal platform that supports automated document generation and editing.

This is a contract role initially focused on delivering a high-impact system that will become a core part of the Essential Estates platform.



Primary Responsibilities

Design and implement a document automation system that:

• Generates legal documents from structured data

• Supports merge fields and template rendering

• Allows attorneys to edit language without breaking document regeneration

• Integrates with the Essential Estate platform backend

• Replaces the current Formstack Documents workflow

You will collaborate with:

• existing engineering team

• product leadership

• designers

• attorneys who use the system daily



Technology Stack

Frontend

React

TypeScript

Backend

NestJS (Node)

Database

PostgreSQL

Infrastructure

AWS



Requirements

• 5+ years experience building production web applications

• strong experience with React and Node-based backend frameworks

• experience designing backend APIs and data models

• ability to work independently in a small team environment

• strong English communication skills

• proficiency in leveraging AI and AI agents to prototype and ship code

Candidates must overlap with US Pacific afternoon working hours (at least noon-6pm Pacific).



Nice to Have

Experience with:

• document generation systems

• templating engines

• workflow automation systems

• legal technology platforms



Contract Details

Initial contract: 3–6 months

Possible extension or long-term role depending on project needs.

We are open to candidates located in:

• Eastern Europe

• Philippines

• Latin America



How to Apply

Please include:

• GitHub or portfolio

• example of a system you built end-to-end

• short description of why this project interests you

Compensation

This is a contract role with a budget of $50–$80 per hour depending on experience and location.

title: Marketing + Sales Support VA
description:
SALES & GROWTH MANAGER - FOXSTAYS



We’re looking for a highly driven Sales & Growth Manager to help grow FoxStays through outbound sales, lead conversion, client communication, and strategic partnerships.



This is a sales-first role. Around 80-90% of the work is focused on outreach, follow-up, deal progression, and closing. The remaining 10-20% includes light marketing support.



In this role, you will cold call homeowners, dock owners, brokers, realtors, yacht agents, and potential partners. You will also reach out through phone,
, WhatsApp, and social media to generate leads, qualify opportunities, book meetings, and help move deals forward.



You will respond to inbound inquiries, call leads quickly, follow up consistently, and keep opportunities organized through every stage of the pipeline.



You will also contact FoxStays guests to offer approved add-on services such as rental cars, boat trips, and local experiences in order to increase revenue from existing bookings.



You will help build relationships with brokers, dock owners, realtors, and local business partners, and support new referral and partnership opportunities.



You will maintain the CRM by tracking leads, conversations, follow-ups, and deal stages, and by keeping the pipeline updated and organized.



You may also support light marketing tasks such as posting on social media, replying to comments and messages, engaging in relevant
 groups, and creating simple Canva content when needed.



Requirements:

Strong spoken and written English

Comfortable with daily calls and outreach

Sales, business development, or customer-facing experience

Strong follow-up habits and confidence handling objections

Organized, proactive, and persistent

CRM experience is a plus

Experience in hospitality, real estate, luxury service, yachting, or partnerships is a plus



KPIs:

Call and outreach volume

Response speed

Follow-ups completed

Meetings booked

Deals closed

Revenue generated



Compensation:

Base salary

Commission

Performance bonus



This role is for someone who is confident, organized, persistent, and motivated by results.



To apply, please send a short introduction about yourself, your relevant experience, and a voice recording in English.

title: Online Community Research Assistant (Community Platforms / Social Media)
description:
We are looking for someone who understands how niche online communities and social platforms work (Reddit, Discord,
/X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, forums).



Your job is not marketing or sales.

Your job is to find people actively discussing certain problems online and invite them to give honest feedback on a project we are testing.

We are trying to understand how real users react to the platform.



The Goal

The goal is not to promote the platform.

The goal is to collect honest feedback from real people who are currently experiencing the problem.

Your role is to interact naturally with those users and invite them to briefly test the platform and share their genuine opinion.



Your daily tasks will include:

Identifying people actively discussing problems such as:

Doomscrolling

Algorithm fatigue

Difficulty finding useful content online

Participating naturally in discussions.

Inviting some users to briefly test the project and share honest feedback.

Collecting real user reactions and reporting them.



You may operate on any platform where real conversations are happening, including but not limited to:

Reddit

Discord


 / X

YouTube comments

TikTok comments

Instagram comments

Forums or niche communities



The important factor is real conversations happening in real time, not the platform itself.

For example, if a video or post has many people complaining about doomscrolling, algorithm fatigue, or the difficulty of finding useful content, you may engage in that discussion naturally and invite interested users to briefly test the platform.



Expected Daily Output

Generate 5–10 real visits to the platform through honest, non-spammy invitations.

Deliver 4–5 real user insights (feedback)



Examples of insights we value:

“This is confusing because…”

“I would actually use this if it had…”

“This feels like another useless directory…”



Each insight should include:

Link to the conversation or post

Screenshot (only if a public link is not available)

Short summary of the feedback



You should:

Be comfortable navigating online communities and social platforms

Understand community etiquette and how to participate naturally

Have strong written English

Be able to detect sarcasm, frustration, and tone in conversations



This role is not spam or promotion.

This role requires natural participation in conversations.

If your messages look like marketing, communities will reject them.



Important Rules

Never:

Spam links

Copy/paste the same message

Start conversations by promoting the project

First engage naturally. Only invite people when it makes sense.



Trial Period

This role will start with a paid trial (1 week).

Typical time commitment:

2–3 hours per day

If the collaboration works well, we can continue long-term.



When applying, send me:

A Reddit thread (or any public post) where someone is complaining about doomscrolling, algorithm feeds, or difficulty finding useful content.

Write the response you would post to that person.



This helps us understand how you interact naturally in online communities.

title: Video Editor for Podcast (Ongoing Projects | Flexible Work Setup)
description:

We’re looking for a reliable and skilled video editor to help us edit podcast episodes into clean, engaging, YouTube-ready content.



If you’re fast, consistent, and easy to work with, this can turn into regular, long-term projects.



 What You’ll Do

- Clean audio (noise reduction, EQ, leveling)

- Remove dead air, filler words, and long pauses

- Improve pacing and flow

- Basic color correction

- Occasionally create short clips (30–90 sec)



Requirements

- Experience editing podcasts or talking-head videos

- Familiar with Riverside recordings

- Good internet and reliable turnaround

- Can follow instructions and communicate clearly



Pay (Per Project)

This is paid per episode. When applying, please include your package rate (USD):

- Full episode edit (45–90 min raw)

- How many revisions included

- How many short clips included

- If trailers / intro edits are included

- If you offer bundle pricing (episode + shorts)



Also include:

title: Senior Tax Accountant
description:
At About Profit, we are ALL about advising small business clients on maximizing their profitability. We are one of only 60 Profit First Mastery Certified Firms in the United States. That means we are the go-to experts in cash management and profitability for savvy small business owners who have cash in the bank to correlate to their profitability.



Even though our team stretches across the country, we work with a Staten Island hustle and a Brooklyn grind that our clients love.



Our team is growing! We need a Senior Accountant.



About Profit's Core Values



No A**holes: We promote positive interactions and are free from toxic behavior.

Friendly: We create a welcoming and approachable work environment.

Personable: We are genuine and create relatable interactions within the workplace.







Key Responsibilities 



#1. Complete clean-up for new clients - including fixing issues, reconciling accounts, completing client notes, and creating the REVIEW SHEET for the client's financials. 

Measure of Success: New clients' books are ready for bookkeeping staff to begin ongoing monthly work within seven business days of initiating client onboarding 



#2. Reply to customer
s quickly and efficiently. 

Measure of Success: 100% of
s are acknowledged during the same business day with a thoughtful and helpful reply. 90% of client requests do not incur a second request/-inquiry from the client because their initial request was sufficiently fulfilled.



#3. Tee-up tax returns for Tax Managers to complete by reviewing clients' accounting files, reconciling balances to end-of-year bank account statements, flagging and getting resolution on any issues that would impact the accuracy of data in preparing the return, and completing data entry into the tax software.

Measure of Success: Complete daily assigned tax work in the budgeted time  allotted for each work card in Carbon (project management software)



#4. Pull and review Monthly Financial Statements for assigned full-service bookkeeping and tax accounting clients, including: 

Annual Comparison

% of Income Comparison by Month

Cross-check against clients' other applicable software/systems that feed or are reflected in their financials

Review balance sheet and corresponding accounts such as Sales Tax, Payroll, A/R, A/P, Inventory, etc.

Measure of Success: Provide feedback to bookkeeping staff to ensure 10% or less rate of recurring errors. 



#5. Proactively identify the "out of the normal" exceptions, errors, and opportunities for improvement - especially when backing up Junior Accountant 

Measure of Success: Complete regular, monthly 1:1 meetings with individual bookkeepers and interns - including providing written notes highlighting at least five learning and/or problem-solving points with each bookkeeper or intern



Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Accounting or a related field

At least 3 years of US bookkeeping experience with a US accounting firm

Required proficiency in QuickBooks Desktop (QBD) and QuickBooks Online (QBO)

Strong communication skills, both written and verbal

Tech-savvy, with proficiency in tools such as Excel and automation applications.

title: Paid Media Manager
description:
Paid Media Manager (Lead Gen-Meta, TikTok, YouTube & Google)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full Time

Salary: $1,500-$2000 per month

Experience Required: Minimum 5 Years

Work Hours: 9-6pm UK Time

How to Apply: 

Fill the form: https: // forms. gle/ Es1tdVhVP8iM 3afx6 (remove the spaces)



Role Overview

We are a fast growing UK pay per lead marketing and scalable agency focused on high volume lead generation for clients in the legal claim sector. Our lead gen campaigns include but it is not limited to personal injury, financial claims, US Motor vehicle a
 & more.

We're looking for an experienced paid media manager who understands the pay per lead model at a strategic level and has experience managing campaigns that generate thousands of leads every month while building the internal systems required to support consistency and guidance for junior media buyers.



Requirements

• Minimum 5 years experience managing direct response lead generation in B2C vertical like Personal Injury

 • Proven experience managing profitable lead generation campaigns

 • Experience managing or leading a team of media buyers

 • Strong analytical and data interpretation skills

 • Experience managing campaigns across Meta,  TikTok, Google and X

 • Understanding of landing page optimisation and conversion rate optimisation

 • Experience with tracking tools and integrations such as Google Tag Manager and Zapier

 • Experience building systems or processes that improve media buying operations

 • Ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously in a fast paced environment



Key Responsibilities

Campaign Strategy and Planning

• Develop and execute scalable media buying strategies for lead generation campaigns

 • Plan campaign structures, audiences, creatives and funnels to maximise ROI

 • Identify opportunities to scale profitable campaigns across multiple traffic sources



Campaign Management

• Launch, monitor and optimise campaigns to meet target CPLs & CVRs across multiple advertising platforms

 • Manage campaign budgets and ensure efficient allocation of ad spend

 • Continuously test audiences, creatives and funnels to improve performance

 • Maintain consistent campaign performance across multiple accounts



Team Leadership

 • Manage and oversee a small team of media buyers

 • Provide guidance, training and performance feedback

 • Ensure campaigns are executed according to strategy and best practices

 • Maintain accountability for team performance and campaign outcomes



Systems and Operational Management

 • Develop and maintain systems that improve media buying efficiency and consistency

 • Create and manage SOPs for campaign setup, optimisation and reporting

 • Implement workflows that ensure campaign quality control and reduce errors

 • Improve processes to support campaign scaling and team productivity



Data Analysis, Research and Reporting

- Analyse campaign data to identify trends, opportunities and inefficiencies

- Conduct market and competitor research to inform campaign strategy

- Produce performance reports with actionable insights

- Use data to guide scaling decisions and budget allocation

- Comfortable with google sheets and other reporting tools



Advertising Platforms

•  Meta Ads

 • Google Ads

 • X 
) Ads

 • TikTok Ads



Creative Development

- Be comfortable writing direct response text copy & video scripts 

- Develop static ad creatives to improve campaign performance

- Work with designers to iterate and optimise creatives

- Experience developing video creatives is a strong advantage +



Landing Page Development

- Build and optimise landing pages, quiz funnels designed to maximise lead conversions

- Conduct test and improvements to increase conversion rates



Tracking and Software Integration

- Implement and manage tracking using tools such as Google Tag Manager

- Integrate marketing tools using platforms like Zapier

- Ensure accurate data tracking and attribution across campaigns

- Comfortable creating reports and dashboards using Google Sheet



Application Requirement

Applicants must include evidence of campaigns they have previously managed, such as:

• Screen recording or case studies showing campaign performance in lead generation verticals showcasing:  Ad spend managed, Cost per lead or acquisition achieved & Platform used (Meta, Google, TikTok etc)



Important: Applications that do not include specific campaign examples or case studies will not be considered.

title: Video Editor & AI Content Creator for Social Media Ads
description:
ABOUT US:

Lucky Pets is a fast-growing German D2C brand selling premium 

nutritional supplements for dogs. Developed with veterinarians, 

manufactured in Germany. Our main sales channel is Meta 


 & Instagram) and we are scaling aggressively.



THE ROLE:

We are looking for a performance video editor who lives and breathes 

Meta advertising. You understand how VSLs work, how to structure 

long-form paid social content, and how to turn a script into a 

video that sells. You work fast, you work independently, and you 

deliver multiple finished videos per day.



WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON:



? VSLs (Video Sales Letters) — 3 to 5 minutes long

   The core of our Meta strategy. You receive a script. You turn it 

   into a fully finished, conversion-optimized video — including 

   sourcing visuals, B-roll, AI-generated content, captions, pacing, 

   and sound design. 



? Short-For
ta Ads — 30 to 90 seconds

   Hook-first, fast-paced, direct response ads for
 and 

   Instagram Feed and Reels.



FORMAT:

9:
 vertical for
 & Instagram. Same assets but maybe with slightly changes also run on 

Pinterest, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

You own the video from script to finished file. That means:

? Sourcing all visuals — B-roll, stock footage, or AI-generated content

? Creating custom AI video content tailored to our brand and audience

   (cute, emotional, brand-fit dog visuals — animated, comic-style, 

   or cinematic AI footage). We have had good experience with Kling 

   — but you use whatever tool gets the best result.

? Captions, pacing, music, sound design

? Hook optimization — if you see a better way to open the script, 

   speak up. We value that.



We provide: the script and UGC material when available for the specific product.

You provide: everything else.



HOW WE WORK:

We keep things simple and structured. There is a clear task list 

that you work through. You have everything you need to get started and 

we trust you to deliver. We love working with people who are 

self-driven and take pride in their output.



Especially in the beginning, we will have more frequent check-ins 

and feedback rounds together — until we have found our shared style, 

vision, and quality standard. Once we are aligned, things will flow 

naturally from there. 



REQUIREMENTS:

? Proven experience editing Meta ads — VSLs and short-form. 

   Portfolio with real ad examples required.

? Deep understanding of VSL structure: hook ? problem ? agitation 

   ? solution ? proof ? offer ? CTA

? Knows how to stop the scroll in the first 2–3 seconds

? Strong self-sourcing skills — you find your own visuals

? AI video generation is a core skill, not optional. You must be 

   able to create high-quality AI visuals independently.

? Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

? Works fast, delivers in volume, manages own time



HIRING PROCESS:

Paid test project to start.

? You receive: company briefing and script

? Your task: deliver one finished Meta VSL (4–5 minutes)

? Turnaround: 3–4 days

? Pay: $20



If we love the result, we would love to bring you on full-time (40h/week) .

title: Data Engineer (Cloud & GIS Focus)
description:
We’re looking for a hands-on Data Engineer who enjoys building things end-to-end — from designing data systems to deploying and running them in production.

If you like owning your work, solving real-world data problems, and building scalable systems in the cloud, this role is for you.

You’ll help us power analytics, AI, and GIS-driven products with reliable, production-grade data infrastructure.



What You’ll Do

Build & Own Data Systems

- Turn business requirements into scalable data solutions

- Design and build clean, maintainable data pipelines (ETL/ELT)

- Develop batch and streaming workflows

- Improve performance, reliability, and monitoring

- Deploy and maintain systems in production



Cloud & Infrastructure

- Work with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and Firebase

- Containerize and deploy services using Docker

- Set up CI/CD workflows with GitHub

- Ensure systems are scalable, reliable, and cost-efficient

- Implement logging, monitoring, and data quality checks



Data & Performance

- Design and optimize PostgreSQL schemas and queries

- Implement validation, observability, and reliability checks

- Support AI and GIS-based data workflows



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have

- 2 years of experience in Data Engineering or similar role

- Strong PostgreSQL experience (schema design & performance tuning)

- Solid Python skills

- Experience with GCP

- Docker experience

- GitHub (including CI/CD workflows)

- Ability to independently deploy and maintain production systems



Nice to Have (Big Plus)

Experience with GIS / geospatial tools such as:

- Shapely

- QGIS

- GDAL

- GeoPandas

- H3

- Google Maps API



Experience working with spatial data or map-based analytics is a strong advantage.



Attach a PDF copy of your resume when you submit your application.

title: Data Engineer
description:
We are seeking a highly driven, hands-on Data Engineer to own and execute our end-to-end data architecture — from requirements definition to system design, implementation, deployment, and long-term operations.

You will build and operate scalable, production-grade data infrastructure that powers analytics, AI systems, and GIS workloads. This role requires both strong engineering fundamentals and a DevOps mindset — you will not only build systems, but deploy, monitor, and maintain them in cloud environments.



Key Responsibilities

 End-to-End Data Ownership

- Translate business and product requirements into scalable technical solutions

- Design clean, maintainable data architecture and workflows

- Implement robust ETL/ELT pipelines

- Ensure long-term maintainability, monitoring, and optimization

Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps

- Containerize and deploy services using Docker

- Implement CI/CD workflows using GitHub

- Ensure high availability, scalability, and cost efficiency

Data Engineering & Systems

- Build and maintain batch and streaming pipelines

- Implement data validation, observability, and reliability checks

- Support AI-driven and GIS-based data workflows



Must-Have Technical Skills

Hands-on production experience with:

- PostgreSQL (schema design, indexing, performance tuning)

- Python (modern dependency management, uv preferred)

- Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

- Firebase

- Docker (containerization & deployment)

You must be capable of independently deploying and maintaining systems in production.



Nice to Have (Strong Plus)

- QGIS

- GDAL

- GeoPandas

- H3

Experience working with spatial datasets, spatial indexing, or map-based analytics is a significant advantage.



Experience Requirements

Soft Skills

title: Software Developer / API Specialist – Automation & Accounting

Required Skills

• Experience building backend automation systems

Preferred Qualifications

title: Remote Inside Sales Agent (Full-Time, PST Hours)
description:
**Work From Anywhere | Join a Fast-Growing Real Estate Investment Firm**



Are you a persuasive communicator who thrives in inside sales? Do you enjoy qualifying leads, setting high-quality appointments, and driving deals forward through consistent follow-up?



If you’re looking for a long-term remote career with a company that values growth, accountability, and integrity — this opportunity is for you.



About the Role

Position: Inside Sales Agent (ISA)

Location: Anywhere – 100% Remote

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM–5:00 PM Pacific Time

(Occasional weekend work up to 4 hours)

Work Hours: 40 hours/week



As an Inside Sales Agent, you’ll be the frontline sales professional responsible for handling inbound and outbound leads, qualifying motivated sellers, and setting appointments for our acquisitions team. You’ll play a critical role in driving revenue by ensuring only high-quality opportunities move forward.



You’ll work closely with a supportive, performance-driven team that values consistency, ownership, and continuous improvement.



Qualifications & Requirements 

* Minimum 6 months of experience as an Inside Sales Agent (REQUIRED)

* Experience handling high-volume inbound and outbound calls

* Background in real estate, wholesaling, acquisitions, or property sales is a strong plus

* Proven ability to qualify leads, uncover motivation, and handle objections

* Confident, professional, and persuasive phone presence

* Excellent English communication skills (clear, neutral accent preferred)

* Strong follow-up skills and ability to nurture leads over time

* Comfortable working with CRM systems, dialers, and lead management tools

* Highly organized, detail-oriented, and consistent with data entry and notes

* Self-motivated, reliable, and able to hit daily/weekly call and appointment targets

* Team-oriented mindset with a strong sense of accountability

* Positive attitude and genuine interest in building rapport and long-term relationships





Technical Requirements

* Reliable high-speed internet (minimum 50 Mbps) with backup connection

* Reliable laptop/desktop and smartphone

* Quiet, distraction-free workspace suitable for sales calls





About SV Ventures

SV Ventures is a California-based real estate investment firm specializing in residential fix-and-flip projects and new construction throughout the Bay Area. We manage the full lifecycle — acquisitions, design, renovations, and financing — and we’re growing rapidly.



Our culture is built on strong core values:

-Growth Mindset – We learn, adapt, and improve continuously

-Accountability – We take ownership and deliver results

-Relationships – We build trust through every interaction

-Transparency – We value honesty, integrity, and clear communication



If these values resonate with you, you’ll feel right at home here.



Compensation & Benefits

-Hourly Rate: $6–8/hour (based on experience)

-3th Month Pay Bonus (with the opportunity to earn beyond for exceptional performance)

-Property Sale Bonus: $50 per property sold (Average: 12–20 properties per year)

-Bi-weekly Pay

-Long-term, stable remote position with growth opportunities





How to Apply

Please submit the following:



1. Resume (PDF or Word format)

2. Screenshot of Internet Speed Test

3. Computer Specs (make, model, RAM, storage, year of manufacture)

4. 3-minute video (Loom or YouTube only) answering:

      -Tell us about yourself — your experience, education, and why you’re a strong fit for an Inside Sales Agent role

      -What do you believe are the most important qualities of a successful Inside Sales Agent?





Ready to grow with us?

Apply now and become part of a team that values your success as much as its own.



Join SV Ventures — where growth, accountability, and opportunity meet.

title: Visual Content Builder for YouTube Channel - DTC Marketing (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
We're building a YouTube channel focused on creative strategy for DTC and e-commerce brands. The channel is growing fast and we need someone to take video outlines and build them into polished visual whiteboards that the founder films against.



This is not a video editing role. You are building the visuals that appear on screen during filming. Think charts, diagrams, frameworks, comparisons, and images arranged on a digital whiteboard (Miro) that the founder scrolls through while talking.



What You'll Do



Take a video outline with visual descriptions and build each visual on a Miro board. Create charts and graphs using AI tools like Graphy, Miro AI, or similar platforms. Build diagrams, flowcharts, frameworks, and comparison graphics that explain concepts visually. Generate or source images using AI image generators (Midjourney, DALL-E, or similar) when the outline calls for visual metaphors or reference images. Add text blocks with key phrases, definitions, or labels onto the board. Arrange everything in the correct order with clean spacing so the founder can scroll through it naturally during filming. Create LinkedIn carousel slides in Canva based on outlines provided (black background, white text, 1080x1080 format). Deliver 1 to 2 finished boards per week plus 1 to 2 carousel designs.



What You Won't Do



You won't be editing video. You won't be on camera. You won't be writing scripts or outlines. You won't be managing social media accounts. You receive a clear brief for every board and you build it. The creative direction comes from us. You execute it.



Who You Are



Strong design sense. Not a professional graphic designer, but you know what looks clean, readable, and well-organized versus what looks cluttered and messy. Comfortable with Miro, Canva, or Figma. You'll be building in these tools daily. You don't need to be an expert in all three. Proficiency in at least one and willingness to learn the others. Comfortable with AI tools. You should be able to use AI chart generators, AI image generators, and Miro AI to speed up your work. Building everything from scratch manually is too slow. AI does the heavy lifting, you refine and arrange. Detail-oriented. Spacing, alignment, font consistency, color consistency. The small things matter. Every board should look like it came from the same brand. Reliable and communicative. You deliver on time. If something is unclear or you're running behind, you say so early. No surprises. Available during US business hours. Minimum 4 to 6 hours of overlap with EST.



Required Experience



Experience with at least one design or whiteboard tool (Miro, Figma, Canva, or similar). Experience creating charts, diagrams, or visual presentations. Experience with AI image generation tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, or similar). Strong written English for communication.



Bonus (Not Required)



Familiarity with the DTC, e-commerce, or digital marketing space. Experience building YouTube content or presentation visuals. Experience with Graphy or similar AI chart tools. Understanding of what makes educational content visually engaging.



Our Visual Style



Black and white with grey accents. Clean. Minimal. Professional. No bright colors unless they serve a specific purpose in a chart. No decorative elements. No gradients. Think high-end consulting firm, not colorful infographic. Every visual should be easy to read at a glance on a screen recording.



Tools We Use



Miro (primary whiteboard). Canva (carousels and social graphics). Graphy (charts and data visualization). Midjourney or similar (AI image generation). Google Workspace (communication and file sharing).



How to Apply

title: Marketing and Social Media Manager
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a part-time or full-time strategic, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to lead and execute our social media and digital marketing efforts from start to finish. This is not a “post-and-go” role. We are looking for someone who can think strategically, execute consistently, and manage the full lifecycle of marketing initiatives with direction and vision provided by the owner. 



You will take ownership of social media, content planning, and digital marketing execution while collaborating closely with the founder to ensure everything aligns with the brand’s voice, goals, and standards.



Key Responsibilities

- Lead and execute social media strategy across platforms (Instagram, Pinterest, TikTok, etc.)

- Create and manage monthly and quarterly marketing calendars

- Develop and schedule content aligned with brand goals

- Create the concept and edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok-style content)

- Design graphics using Canva (brand-aligned templates, posts, stories)

- Support SEO initiatives (blog formatting, keyword optimization, SEO audits)

- Update and maintain the company website using WordPress (Elementor)

- Repurpose content across platforms to maximize reach

- Track performance metrics and suggest optimizations

- Stay organized and ensure deadlines are met consistently

- See projects through from concept to execution to completion



Required Skills & Experience

- Proven experience managing and executing social media for a brand or business

- Strong understanding of digital marketing strategy, not just posting



Experience with:

- Canva

- Video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar)

- WordPress (Elementor specifically)

- SEO fundamentals (on-page SEO, keywords, metadata, blog optimization)

- Ability to follow brand guidelines while also offering thoughtful ideas

- Strong organizational and time-management skills

- Excellent written communication in English

- Comfortable working independently and taking ownership

- Experience executing content calendars without constant supervision



This role is best suited for someone who:



- Thinks strategically but enjoys executing

- Takes initiative and ownership

- Is organized, proactive, and reliable

- Can manage multiple tasks without missing details

- Enjoys seeing projects through from start to finish

- Is open to feedback and committed to high-quality work



Trial Period

Final candidates will be invited to participate in a paid 7-day trial involving clearly defined tasks. This allows both sides to confirm fit, communication style, and working rhythm before moving forward.



How to Apply

Please include the following:



1. Provide a video (5 minutes or less) answering the following questions:

     - An introduction of yourself

     - If you are given a general goal (e.g. “increase inquiries from Instagram from 10 to 30 per month”) but no step-by-step instructions. Walk us through how you would approach this from planning to execution



2. Complete and submit this form:

title: Cold Email Marketing Specialist
description:
ABOUT US:

We are a fast-growing internet marketing agency specializing in AI-powered receptionist systems for wellness centers, fitness studios, and boutique gyms. Our mission is simple: help businesses never miss another call, automate bookings, and increase revenue effortlessly.



We move fast, value results, and reward people who take ownership.



ABOUT THE ROLE:

We are looking for a highly skilled Cold
 Marketing Specialist to manage and execute outbound
 campaigns. This is not a beginner role—we want someone who understands deliverability, inbox management, and how to generate real replies (not just send
s).



You will be responsible for setting up, managing, and optimizing cold
 systems that consistently generate qualified leads and booked appointments.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Set up and manage cold
 campaigns (daily sending, monitoring, optimization)

- Manage multiple inboxes and domains (Google Workspace or similar)

- Warm up
 accounts and maintain deliverability health

- Upload and manage lead lists

- Personalize
 campaigns when needed

- Monitor campaign performance (open rates, reply rates, positive responses)

- A/B test subject lines, messaging, and sequences

- Handle basic replies and tag qualified leads

- Ensure all campaigns avoid spam triggers and follow best practices

- Continuously improve campaign performance and suggest ideas



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE:



- Proven experience with cold
 marketing (REQUIRED)

- Strong understanding of:

-
 deliverability (SPF, DKIM, DMARC)

- Inbox warm-up strategies

- Spam avoidance and best practices

- Experience using tools like:

- Instantly, Smartlead, or similar platforms

- Google Workspace /
 inbox management

- Ability to manage multiple campaigns at once

- Strong written English (clear, natural, conversational tone)

- Attention to detail and organization

- Ability to follow systems AND think independently



IDEAL CANDIDATE:



- Has experience generating real leads (not just sending
s)

- Is proactive and takes initiative without being micromanaged

- Communicates clearly and gives updates regularly

- Problem-solver mindset (doesn’t wait to be told what to do)

- Hungry to grow and improve

- Takes pride in their work and performance





BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED BUT A PLUS):



- Experience with lead sourcing tools (Apollo, Clay, etc.)

- Copywriting skills for cold outreach

- Experience in the fitness, wellness, or local business niche

- Familiarity with AI tools or automation



COMPENSATION:



- Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

- Performance-based bonuses tied to results (reply rates, booked calls, etc.)

- Long-term opportunity for growth within the company



HOW TO APPLY:



To apply, please include:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with cold
 marketing

3. Tools you’ve used

4. Results you’ve achieved (open rates, reply rates, etc.)

5. The word “Inbox” at the top of your application (to confirm attention to detail)



IMPORTANT:

We are looking for someone long-term. If you are reliable, detail-oriented, and driven to produce results, this role can grow into a higher-paying position with more responsibility.





We’re not just looking for someone to “do tasks”—we’re looking for someone who wants to own this channel and win with us.

title: Amazon Ungating & Seller Support Specialist (UK & US)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon Ungating & Seller Support Specialist to help our business get approved to sell brands and categories in the UK and US marketplaces.



This role is specifically focused on Amazon category approvals, brand ungating, case handling, and back-and-forth communication with Amazon Seller Support and related teams. We already have genuine business documentation and legitimate supply chain documents. We need someone who understands how to present these correctly to Amazon and manage the process efficiently.



What you will be doing:

Reviewing our invoices, authorisation letters, and supporting documents

Identifying what is missing or what may cause Amazon to reject an application

Submitting ungating applications for brands and categories in Amazon UK and Amazon US

Handling the back-and-forth with Amazon Seller Support through Seller Central

Writing clear and professional case responses and follow-ups

Reapplying when needed with improved documentation and explanations

Tracking all applications, statuses, next actions, and outcomes

Advising us on the best route to get approvals as quickly as possible using legitimate methods only



Important:

You must work only within Amazon’s policies

No fake invoices, no manipulated documents, and no black-hat methods

We only want someone who can help using real documentation and compliant processes



Requirements:

Strong experience with Amazon Seller Central

Proven experience getting brands or categories ungated in Amazon UK and/or Amazon US

Strong written English

Very organised and detail-oriented

Able to explain clearly why an application was rejected and what should be changed

Comfortable managing multiple cases at once

Must understand invoices, supplier documentation, letters of authorisation, and Amazon compliance expectations



Preferred:

Experience with grocery, topicals, beauty, supplements, or other restricted categories

Experience with account health, appeals, and policy-related case handling

Experience working with wholesalers, distributors, and branded products



How we will work:

You will be given appropriate access to our Seller Central account through user permissions

You will communicate through the account and keep a clear log of all actions taken

We want someone proactive who can take ownership of the process and reduce the amount of time we personally spend dealing with Amazon



What success looks like:

Faster and better-quality case submissions

Fewer unnecessary rejections

More successful approvals for the brands/categories we need

Clear communication and organised tracking of every application



To apply, please answer the following in your application:

What Amazon UK and US ungating experience do you have?

Which categories or brands have you successfully helped get approved?

What is your process when Amazon rejects an application?

Have you worked with invoices, LOAs, and supplier documentation before?

Please give 1–2 examples of successful ungating work you have done

Confirm that you only use compliant methods and genuine documents



We are looking for someone reliable and experienced who can start immediately.

Sales & Conversion

- Build subscriber lists through lead magnets,
 funnels, and paid ads.

 sequences that convert interest into sales.

Required Qualifications
