The ideal candidate has strong experience in digital marketing, understands social media ecosystems, and can independently implement ideas into actionable marketing tasks.

, Instagram, and LinkedIn.

nts in long videos and transform them into engaging short content.

title: MSP Dispatcher
description:
We are a U.S.-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Dispatcher / Service Coordinator to join our team full-time.



This role is critical to keeping our support operations running smoothly. You will be responsible for answering incoming calls, triaging support requests, creating and assigning tickets, and ensuring our technicians are scheduled efficiently.



You will be the first point of contact for many of our clients, so strong communication skills and professionalism are extremely important.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming support calls and create tickets

• Triage issues and assign tickets to the appropriate technician

• Schedule and coordinate service appointments

• Follow up with clients to ensure issues are resolved

• Keep tickets updated with accurate notes

• Monitor ticket queues and ensure SLAs are met

• Assist with basic support tickets when possible (password resets, simple troubleshooting, etc.)

• Communicate clearly with both clients and technicians



Requirements:

• Excellent English speaking and writing skills

• Experience working with a helpdesk or ticketing system (preferred)

• Strong organizational and multitasking skills

• Ability to work during U.S. business hours

• Reliable internet and quiet work environment

• Experience in IT or MSP environment is a strong plus



IMPORTANT – VIDEO REQUIREMENT:

To be considered, you MUST submit a short video (1–2 minutes) answering the following:



Tell us about your experience related to this role



Describe your experience with customer service or IT support



What hours are you available to work (in your local time and U.S. time)



Do you currently have any other jobs or clients?



Applications without a video will NOT be considered.



We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with our company.



To confirm you have read this job post, please include the word "DispatcherPro" in your application subject line.

title: Full-time Video Editor & AI Content Creator
description:
Background



We’re a fast-growing social media agency producing high-performing short-form content across Instagram,
, YouTube, and more.



We’re hiring a full-time AI Video Specialist to create raw AI clips and assemble them into polished short-form videos using our internal workflows.



This is an execution role. Not strategy.

You’ll be given clear briefs, proven systems, and step-by-step Standard Operating Procedures (SOP's) for every task.



If you haven't used every tool on our stack yet, that's okay we'll teach the right person.



What You'll Do



Video Editing

- Turn raw footage into high-retention short-form content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

- Add captions, overlays, transitions, sound design, and B-roll in CapCut

- Follow brand guidelines and client briefs exactly

- Apply feedback quickly and accurately

- Deliver a consistent daily output, on time

- Maintain brand consistency across multiple client accounts



AI Clip Generation

- Generate AI video assets using tools like Veo3 and HeyGen

- Execute SOPs precisely (prompts, settings, formats are predefined)

- Quality check all outputs (accuracy, artifacts, exports) before submission

- Flag issues and gaps to improve workflows

- Organize and label all assets clearly for handoff



General

- Manage multiple client projects without missing deadlines

- Keep files structured and easy to navigate

- Communicate proactively on progress, timelines, and blockers



Requirements



Must-Haves

- Proven experience editing short-form content - PORTFOLIO REQUIRED

- Strong proficiency in English (speaking, reading, writing)

- Strong proficiency in CapCut

- Comfortable following SOPs (execute first, revise/polish second)

- High attention to detail and quality

- Able to manage multiple projects without missing deadlines

- Reliable internet and dedicated workspace

- Minimum 4 hours timezone overlap with the team

- Coachable, fast learner, and willing to adopt new tools



Nice-to-Haves

- Experience with AI video tools (Veo3, HeyGen, etc.)

- Agency or content production background

- Strong understanding of short-form performance (hooks, pacing, retention)

- Familiarity with CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or any other video editing software

- Access to a VPN with dedicated IP



What We Offer

- Stable, full-time remote role with consistent workload

- Clear SOPs and briefs, no guesswork

- Training on AI tools for the right candidate

- Direct, respectful communication and fast feedback

- Growth opportunities as we scale

- Performance bonuses (up to 50% of monthly pay)

- Access to required tools



How to Apply



Include all of the following. INCOMPLETE APPLICATIONS WILL NOT BE REVIEWED:

- Portfolio or reel (Drive, Notion, or direct links)

- 2–3 talking head edits

- AI-generated video samples (if available)

- Short answer (3–5 sentences): What do you do when an SOP is unclear?

- Your timezone + working hours



NO PORTFOLIO -> NO REVIEW

title: Guest Service Specialist - Mornings/Weekends.
description:
About Neat Suites:

Neat Suites is a vacation rental management company based in Covington Kentucky that is focused on managing premium and unique vacation rentals. Our business has been growing and we are in need of an additional tea
mber that can help provide excellent service to our guests. 



Position Overview:

As a Guest Service Representative at Neat Suites, you will be the first point of contact for our guests, ensuring they have a seamless and excellent experience. You will handle guest inquiries, manage guest feedback, and support field operations to maintain our high standards of service and property management. As this is a guest facing role, please include a recording of you introducing yourself with your application. This allows us to ensure that applicants can communicate clearly. Please also include a link to your resume. 



Key Responsibilities:



Guest Support:

- Answer phone calls from guests promptly, ensuring calls are answered by the third ring.

- Address guest messages within 10 minutes via our communication platforms, providing timely and accurate information. 

- Manage incoming reservations, transfer reservations, Send check-in/out instructions, coordinate with housekeeping and maintenance to solve guest issues and more. 

- Manage upsells and add-ons.

- Assist in ensuring smooth check-in and check-out for all guests.



Feedback Analysis:

- Analyze guest feedback and reviews from various channels and compile a recommendations sheet to enhance guest experiences.

- Incorporate feedback from phone calls and messages into actionable insights for the team.



Field Operations Management:

- Review departure cleaning and arrival inspection pictures to ensure properties are clean and ready for guests.

- Collaborate with the housekeeping team to address any issues promptly.

- Prepare detailed reports for housekeeping managers, highlight areas of improvement or recurring issues.

- Use the Breezeway platform to monitor housekeeping schedules, ensuring all cleanings are completed on the same day as guest departures.



Qualifications:



Experience:

- Previous experience in customer service, hospitality, or vacation rental management is preferred.

- Familiarity with short-term rental platforms like Airbnb, Guesty, and Breezeway is a plus.



Skills:

- Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written.

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Ability to multitask and effectively handle multiple guest inquiries simultaneously.

- Proficiency in using technology and software applications for communication and management tasks.



Attributes:

- Friendly and approachable demeanor with a passion for providing outstanding guest service.

- Proactive, problem-solving mindset and the ability to think quickly in dynamic situations.

- Team player with a collaborative spirit and the ability to work independently.



Schedule: (40hr)

- Tuesday: 7:00 AM - 11:00 PM (16hr)

- Wednesday: 7:00 AM - 11:00 PM (16hr)

- Saturday: 11:00 AM - 3:00 PM (8hr)



Note: All hours are in Eastern Time (EST/EDT).



On-Call Schedule: 

- Neat Suites has an on-call schedule during holidays where tea
mbers take turns responding to messages and handling guest issues after regular business hours. There is no expectation for additional work to be completed during these off hours. If no guests message and there are no issues, there is no work required. And of course we offer on-call bonuses! 

- We may also ask that every few weeks, for one week at a time, you. be available to answer emergency calls in the rare event a guest calls during our “closed” hours (11pm to 7am). And to help guests handle those emergencies to the best of your ability, or to involve management if needed. There will also be an on-call bonus for this. 



Benefits:

- Competitive salary

- 13th Month Pay 

- 9 Paid Holidays, Paid Time Off, and Paid Sick Time 

- Opportunities for professional growth and development

- Apply now and be part of the Neat Suites family! 



Company Culture at Neat Suites:

We have a few core values at Neat Suites that guide our work and our team culture. 



Humble Yourself: We believe that team success > individual success.

* Philippians 2:3-4 – “Do nothing out of selfish ambition or vain conceit. Rather, in humility, value others above yourselves, not looking to your own interests but each of you to the interests of the others.”

* Humility is THE key to building a fantastic team.



Openly Communicate: We communicate kindly and candidly—every time.

* We show respect to each other and our guests by addressing issues quickly and kindly and by receiving feedback with empathy and patience.



Think Creatively: We like solving weird and unusual problems.

* We measure creativity not by artistic ability but by the ability to solve problems of all shapes and sizes.



Act Proactively: We’re not jellyfish.

* Jellyfish can’t swim directionally—they just “go with the flow.” We’re not jellyfish. We look around, see what needs to be done, and do it. We determine who we want to be in the future and pursue it.



Prioritize Well: We put Family, Friends, and Faith first.

* We believe we can only bring our best to work when our loved ones, and ourselves, get our best at home. 

* A healthy, robust, and mindful personal life leads to a strong and effective work life.



Embrace Adventure: We step out of our routine and aren’t afraid to fail. - (Please reference "Embrace Adventure" as a key word in your application title for your application to be considered.)

* We are capable of more than we think, but we often don’t realize it unless we step out of our comfort zone and lean in to uncertainty. Adventure either connects us to life’s richest experiences— or sometimes to failure— which brings wisdom.

title: Senior CRM Specialist
description:
Apply here: 



GoHighLevel (GHL) is the CRM backbone of every new client we bring onto the platform. Every gym we onboard gets a GHL account configured to their business, including automations, pipelines, A2P compliance, and integrations. It has to work correctly from day one.



GHL is powerful, constantly evolving, and unforgiving when configured wrong. A missed automation, an unregistered A2P campaign, or a broken pipeline delays the client’s ability to operate and puts the launch at risk. This role exists because GHL is too complex for generalists and too critical to get wrong.



You’ll own the CRM setup process end-to-end: building accounts, configuring workflows, handling compliance, QA-ing your own work, and ensuring every client launches on a foundation that functions. This isn’t a “manage the CRM” role. It’s a “know GHL deeply and build it right every time” role.



What You’ll Do



CRM Setup and Configuration  



- Build and configure GHL sub-accounts for new clients from scratch using standardized templates and SOPs. Set up pipelines, stages, contact properties, automation triggers, and internal notification workflows correctly before anything else can happen.

- Tailor each client’s account to their business. Configure service types, lead capture flows, follow-up sequences, and staff notification logic. Standardized does not mean identical.

- Set up and verify triggers, workflows, and automations so they fire accurately under real conditions, not just saved. Test before handoff.

- Manage sub-account structure for multi-location clients. Ensure clean separation and consistent configuration across locations.



A2P Compliance  



- Register every new client for A2P 10DLC messaging compliance before any SMS campaigns go live. This step is non-negotiable and delays block launch.

- Own brand and campaign registration through GHL, including carrier submissions, monitoring status, and documentation.

- Handle rejections. Diagnose the reason, correct the submission, and resubmit without waiting to be asked.

- Stay current on carrier rules. Flag changes that affect the standard registration process.



Quality and Accuracy  



- QA your own work against a defined checklist before every handoff. Every setup is reviewed to a standard before it leaves your hands.

- Work only moves forward when it meets the checklist, not when it seems probably fine.

- Document issues clearly in the relevant ticket. Flag anything outside standard scope so the next person understands what was done and why.

- Follow SOPs consistently. Raise gaps and outdated steps when found.



Platform Expertise  



- Stay current on GHL releases, policy changes, and UI updates. Assess impact on the standard process and flag issues before they become client-facing.

- Test updates in a sandbox before touching live client accounts.

- Serve as the internal GHL resource. Be the first stop when the team has platform questions or a tricky configuration issue.

- Identify patterns in recurring setup issues and drive SOP improvements to prevent them.

- Flag SOPs that need updating due to product changes.



Ongoing Account Management  



- Update existing client GHL accounts with requested features, workflow additions, and improvements. Apply the same care post-launch as during initial build.

- Handle inbound bug tickets related to GHL. Reproduce the issue, open a support case with GHL on the client’s behalf, track to resolution, and communicate status back to requesters.

- Manage snapshot imports and exports. Create, apply, and maintain snapshots for setups, migrations, and template management.

- Manage account transfers and migrations in and out of GHL. Coordinate to ensure data integrity and continuity.

- Manage phone number ports in and out. Initiate requests, monitor status, troubleshoot rejections, and keep clients informed until complete.



Collaboration and Handoffs  



- Coordinate closely with the website build team. Many clients get both a CRM setup and a Webflow site, and clean handoffs are essential to an on-time launch.

- Communicate clearly on status, blockers, and scope changes in Linear.



What We’re Looking For



Required  



- Hands-on GHL experience configuring sub-accounts from scratch. Pipelines, automations, triggers, contact workflows, and integrations.

- A2P / 10DLC compliance experience. Brand and campaign registration, handling carrier rejections, and navigating the process end-to-end.

- Strong troubleshooting instincts. Isolate where failures occur, why they happened, and what needs to change before escalating.

- Meticulous attention to detail. Catch missed steps before they create client problems at launch.

- SOP discipline. Work systematically and follow documented processes. Flag missing or incorrect steps instead of working around them.

- Clear written English. Documentation and status updates must be actionable without follow-up.



Nice to Have  



- Experience with GHL API, webhooks, or custom integrations

- Familiarity with Webflow

- Background working with fitness businesses or boutique fitness operators

- Experience with PushPress or similar gym management platforms



Success in the First 6 Months  



- You own end-to-end CRM setup for new clients with zero rework flagged in QA. Setups pass the checklist the first time.

- A2P registrations are submitted accurately and approved without rejections caused by process errors.

- You identify at least one SOP gap or outdated step and get it updated.

- The team treats you as the GHL authority for platform questions and tricky configuration issues.

- You complete standard CRM setups within the expected time window, consistently, without oversight on routine tasks.



Why Join PushPress  



- Fully remote, async-friendly team

- Established systems and structured workflows with clear SOPs

- Visible impact on client launches and team efficiency

- Above-market compensation for your region

- AI-native operation with automation and tooling at the core

- Room to grow into automation strategy, tooling improvements, and senior ownership of the CRM function



About PushPress  



PushPress is the AI-powered gym management platform built for boutique fitness.  



We are transforming how boutique fitness owners operate and how the entire $100B global fitness industry connects, transacts, and grows. Trusted by more than 5,000 gyms and 500,000 members, PushPress processes ~$1B annually.  



We're a Series B company backed by Altos Ventures, StepStone, and Mucker Capital, and we're going all-in on AI. Our AI Assistant, AI Member Intel, and AI-powered reporting tools are already changing how gym owners and coaches operate. We believe AI should make the human side of fitness better, not replace it.  



By embedding intelligence directly into the product, we enable boutique fitness owners to make faster decisions, unlock new revenue streams, and collaborate across a connected network. As more gyms join the platform, data compounds, intelligence strengthens, and the value of the ecosystem increases for every owner.  



We are a global team of builders, operators, and fitness fanatics on a mission to level the playing field for independent fitness entrepreneurs. If you are ready to help reshape an industry, let's talk!

title: Senior Ads Manager
description:
Role Overview

What You Will Own



End-to-end management of Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Ads accounts

Budget ownership ranging from $10,000 to $100,000+ per month

Campaign planning, launch, testing, scaling, and controlled shutdowns

Diagnosing performance drops and fixing them without hand-holding

Working closely with creative, tracking, and operations teams

Handling policy issues, disapprovals, and account restrictions

Clear weekly performance reporting focused on decisions, not dashboards

Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)



You must have:



3+ years of hands-on ad buying experience (Meta required, Google preferred)

Personally managed at least $10,000/month in ad spend

Strong understanding of:

Conversion tracking (pixels, CAPI, GA4, GTM)

Attribution trade-offs and data reliability

Experience working with multiple clients simultaneously

Clear written English (you will be client-facing)

If you have only worked on:



boosted posts

single internal brands

learning projects

Do not apply.



Strong Advantage (Read Carefully)



You will be prioritized if you have experience with:



Restricted or sensitive verticals (e.g. gambling, crypto, health, IPTV, finance)

Account bans, BM restrictions, or repeated disapprovals

Pre-emptive compliance structuring and risk isolation

Ad account warm-ups and scaling under constraints

You do not need to be a “blackhat”, but you must understand how platforms actually behave in the real world.



How We Measure You



CPA / ROAS stability over time

Ability to diagnose problems before they become disasters

Quality of decisions under pressure

Clarity in communication with internal teams and management

Application Question (Mandatory)



Answer this clearly and honestly:



“Describe the worst ad account failure or ban you have handled.What happened, and what exactly did you do in the first 72 hours?”



Vague or generic answers will be rejected automatically.



What This Role Is NOT



Not a junior execution role

Not a learning position

Not a reporting-only job

Not suitable if you need step-by-step instructions

Summary



If you are an ads manager who:



owns outcomes,

understands risk,

and can think under pressure,

this role will suit you.



If you are looking to “learn ads” or follow SOPs, this role will not be a fit.



Job Type: Full-time



Benefits:





Flexible schedule

Work from home

Experience:





 Advertising: 3 years (Required)

Work Location: Remote

?

?

?

?

Applications without this answer will not be considered.



?

title: Social Media Manager (AI-Integrated & Growth-Focused)
description:
We are looking for a high-energy, detail-oriented Social Media Manager who lives and breathes digital culture. You aren't just looking to "post content"—you are here to grow an audience, foster a community, and leverage the latest technology to stay ahead of the curve.



1. The Process: Strategy & Execution



You will be the heartbeat of our social presence. Your weekly flow will include:



Strategy & Scheduling: Maintaining and evolving a comprehensive content strategy and publishing schedule.



Content Improvement: Constantly auditing our output to ensure every post is better than the last.



AI-Driven Research: Using AI tools to brainstorm, research trends, and ideate high-performing content concepts.



Team Collaboration: Coordinating closely with our video editors to ensure the creative vision is executed perfectly.



Community Management: Actively engaging with our audience to build brand loyalty and managing comment automation.



Weekly Reporting: Analyzing metrics to see what’s working, what isn't, and pivoting based on data.



2. The Skill Set: Creative & Analytical



We need someone who balances a "perfectionist" eye with a "growth" mindset.



Native-Level English: Exceptional writing and communication skills are non-negotiable.



Platform Expertise: Deep knowledge of platform-specific best practices (IG, TikTok, X, LinkedIn, etc.).



Graphic Design: Ability to create or polish aesthetic assets using modern design tools.



Attention to Detail: You catch the typos and formatting errors before the audience does.



Passion & Teachable Spirit: You have a genuine love for social media and a hunger to keep learning as the industry shifts.



3. The Toolbox: Software Agnostic & Tech Savvy



We don’t care if you have a "favorite" app; we care that you can master the best app for the job.



Software Agnostic: You are comfortable jumping into new interfaces and aren't intimidated by a software switch.



Core Stack: Proficiency in Canva, Google Sheets, and Notion.



Automation & Schedulers: Experience with social media scheduling platforms and comment automation tools (e.g., ManyChat).



4. Experience: Proven Results



This is the most critical part of the application. We are looking for:



Growth Evidence: A proven track record (case studies or portfolios) showing you have successfully grown social media accounts from the ground up or scaled existing ones.



AI Fluency: A deep understanding of how AI is transforming social media management—from prompt engineering for ideation to workflow automation.



HOW TO APPLY:

• Watch this Video: 

• Send Proof of having grown social accounts in the past

title: Integrations Associate – Automation & Systems
description:
DAP Brands is seeking a detail-oriented, technically savvy, and solution-driven Integrations Associate to support our mission of building seamless, scalable automations across the organization. This role goes beyond task execution. You’ll work closely with our Technology Integration Manager to design, maintain, and optimize workflows that improve efficiency across Sales, Marketing, and Operations.



If you enjoy connecting systems, solving process gaps, and leveraging automation tools to create reliable, intelligent workflows, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities:

- Integration Setup & Maintenance: Assist in setting up, testing, launching, and maintaining integrations using platforms such as Zapier, Make, and GoHighLevel. Monitor automations for accuracy and performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement long-term fixes.

- Automation & Workflow Optimization: Identify inefficiencies in existing processes and propose smart automation solutions. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand needs and build tailored workflows.

- Technical Support: Work with APIs, webhooks, and basic scripting (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL) to resolve data sync issues, system errors, and performance bottlenecks.

- Documentation & Training: Document workflows, integrations, and processes to ensure scalability. Assist in training internal users on newly built systems and automation tools.



Tools You’ll Work With:

- Automation & Integrations: Zapier, Make, Webhooks

- CRMs & Operations Tools: GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, Stripe, ClickUp

- Collaboration Tools: Google Sheets, Zoom, Google Workspace

- Scripting & APIs: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL



Application Instructions:

Please submit your application through the online form provided: 
/careers



- To be considered, you MUST type “MAVERICK” in front of your full name if you are applying via our website: 
/careers

- If you are an Integrations Associate who takes ownership, thinks in systems, and thrives in a fast-moving, automation-driven environment, we invite you to apply.

title: VA needed -Marketing Strategist- Full Time, WFH, US Hours
description:
Hello there, awesome VA!



I'm the owner of a small IT company (9 employees- 3 in the Philippines and 6 in the US/ Costa Rica). We're based in Arizona, USA. We provide IT services to small businesses, cybersecurity, and cloud services as well.



We have 3 amazing VAs already, but we're getting busier, and we can use your help...



SOME OF THE EXPECTATIONS YOU SHOULD HAVE WHEN WORKING WITH US:



• Ongoing (monthly) manager review and feedback- you should never guess where you are "standing" and what you, AND THE COMPANY, can do better!

• Paid certifications- we will pay for your courses, tests, and allocate time during business hours to help you achieve your desired goals

• Paid vacations- it's important to us that you are happy, healthy, and have a work-life balance!

• Bonuses- when we win, you win!

• Raises- As we grow, we believe you should as well. We have to stay competitive as an employer to retain our awesome employees!

• Opportunities to grow- In our industry, we can't be on "cruise control"... We need to push our tea
mbers to stay ahead of the technology curve. Help you continually sharpen your skills with a focus on your career aspirations.

• Paid sick days- We understand life happens. We don't want you to feel that you have to drag yourself to work sick, if your body tells you to relax...



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:



Note: While it seems like a LOT is included here, I prefer to list everything I can think of now to avoid major surprises. These tasks are currently handled by our virtual assistants. You will receive training and support to ensure you are comfortable with each responsibility.



Your MAIN responsibilities:



• As a Marketing Strategist, you’ll use AI tools, especially GPT, to write clear, persuasive marketing content and engaging B2B stories. You’ll work closely with the CEO to build marketing systems that help attract leads, increase engagement, and support growth. You’ll need to follow the brand’s voice, work quickly, and focus on the results that matter.

• Responsible for Marketing Analytics

-Analyze marketing campaign performance across digital and traditional channels to identify trends and opportunities.

-Develop and maintain dashboards and reports to monitor key marketing metrics such as ROI, conversion rates, and customer acquisition cost.

-Conduct customer segmentation and targeting analysis to enhance personalization and engagement.

-Perform A/B testing and interpret results to guide campaign optimization.

-Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate data insights into actionable marketing strategies.

-Present findings and recommendations to stakeholders to support data-driven decision-making.

• Social media management (LinkedIn,
, X.com, and Instagram)

• Work alongside our Marketing Consultant and Full Stack Developers on the business development/marketing side of the business.

• Present strategy proposals and performance reports to stakeholders

• Using
 marketing tools like Glasshive, Eventbrite, and other tools for marketing campaigns and assisting with event coordination, venues, guest speakers, and attendees.

• Basic lead generation using Apollo & LinkedIn



OTHER tasks that you can assist with:



• Provide
/call/chat support for inquiries, coordinate information with both clients and company employees (This is NOT a tech support job, but you will assist with coordinating service calls and meetings with clients and vendors)

• Calendar management

• Coordinate courier pickups and deliveries.

• Assist with basic internal audits, documentation, and file management

• Website (WordPress) basic content changes

• Create website and marketing content (Technology-related blog posts from vendor-provided materials, our engineers, and social media.

• Post jobs, candidate screening, review and respond to applications, scheduling interviews, and interview with applicants when needed.

• Assist with projects as needed



WORK HOURS:

• Mon-Fri at 8am-5:30pm (Arizona time zone- MST -7)

• Paid (US) holidays, time-off



REQUIRED:

• AMAZING personality and work ethic

• Excellent written and verbal English with minimal accent

• At least 3-5 years of experience as a Marketing Strategist or similar roles like Digital Marketing Manager, Marketing Analyst, Marketing Manager, Performance Marketing Manager, Growth Marketing Manager, Integrated Marketing Manager, or Digital Marketing Specialist.

• Experience in office applications such as Word, Excel, Outlook, and Teams

• Experience with GPT-4, Claude, or similar AI tools

• Experience in Social Media Marketing, LinkedIn,
, YouTube Shorts

and
 marketing.

• Knowledgeable in Marketing Analytics

• Copywriting frameworks (PAS, AIDA, etc.)

• Experience in Canva, Notion, Cap Cut, Descript, social media management tools, and simple video editing

• Experience in Digital Marketing

• Metrics-driven content strategy and growth loops

• Experience with, and understanding of SEO

• Content Writing

• Technologically savvy

• Knowledge of ticketing systems is a bonus, but not required.

• Knowledgeable with basic data entry



MORE DETAILS:

• A PRE-EMPLOYMENT BACKGROUND CHECK is performed (on our expense). You must have a 100% clean background check. Please do not apply if you don't have a 100% clean background check.

• As part of this position requirement, you must have a computer that will be used exclusively for your work with us. This means we will be installing our security software on that computer, will remove admin rights from you, and monitor/ control it for security and compliance reasons. In return, we will pay you additional “rent” fees, on top of your salary, in the amount of several hundred dollars. Details about this “rental” will be discussed during your second interview. There are minimum requirements that your computer must have in order to be employed with us. You must have a Computer/Laptop with at least i5 minimum 9th gen processor (preferably a newer one) with 16 GB RAM or more, or Ryzen 5/7 (MUST include TPM support) as well as Windows 11 OS.

• You must have a fast and reliable internet connection, minimum 30mbps.

• Noise-cancelling headphones

• At least 1 year of experience working night shift

• Further details and information will be discussed with qualified candidates.



HOW TO APPLY?



Answer the questions below, or you may also send an
 to 
 with the subject line “MS-Feb2026” with your answers:



- An attachment of your resume in PDF format/ link of you resume if you will send us a message.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you have a 100% clean background with no criminal history.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you understand the business hours (MST\ Arizona time zone.

- A confirmation that you have experience with night shift/ working at night.



Answer the following questions: (We have ways to check if your answer is AI-generated. Be as organic and honest in answering the questions. You will be asked to do a quiz/short tasks to gauge your knowledge during the hiring process.)

1. Can you describe your experience managing social media platforms, including the types of content you've created and the tools you've used?

-What social media platforms have you worked with, and what strategies have you implemented to grow engagement or reach?

2. Can you share your experience with SEO, including any tools you've used and strategies you've applied to improve search rankings?

-What specific SEO techniques have you implemented, and what results did you achieve?

3. Can you describe your experience with marketing analytics, including the tools you've used and how you've applied data to improve campaign performance?

-What key metrics do you typically track, and how do you use them to guide marketing decisions?

-Have you worked with platforms like Google Analytics(GA4), Google Tag Manager,
, LinkedIn & Youtube Analytics? If so, how have you used them?



- NO other information/cover letter or attachments should be included, besides a simple salutation and signature if so desired.



Only those who have followed the above instructions will be contacted within up to 2 business days with further instructions.



HIRING PROCESS:

- Resume submission

- Applicant questionnaire form

- Short tasks

-Initial Interview

- Final Interview



We're looking forward to having you join our family!



Beits Livneh, Owner

Gallop Technology Group



 SKILL REQUIREMENT

title: L2 Tech Support Engineer
description:
Dear Technology Lover!

We're a small (but VERY efficient) 20-year-old MSP based in Arizona.

As a small company. we're VERY employee-focused, and believe that our tea
mbers are our MOST IMPORTANT ASSET!



Here are some of the things you can expect from working with us:

• Ongoing (monthly) manager review and feedback- you should never guess where you are "standing" and what you, AND THE COMPANY, can do better!

• Paid certifications- we will pay for your courses, and tests and allocate time during business hours to help you achieve your desired goals

• Paid Time Off- it's important to us that you are happy, healthy, and have a work-life balance!

• Bonuses- when the company wins- you win!

• Raises- As we grow, we believe you should as well. We have to stay competitive as an employer to retain our awesome employees!

• Opportunities to grow- In our industry, we can't be on "cruise control"... We need to push our tea
mbers to stay ahead of the technology curve. Help you continually to sharpen your skills with a focus on your career aspirations.

• Paid sick days- We understand life happens. We don't want you to feel that you have to drag yourself to work sick if your body tells you to relax...



You're the right fit if you:

• LOVE learning, working with, and experimenting with new technology

• Get excited when you save someone's day and provide great service

• Are a hard-working fun person, and see yourself being in the IT industry for the foreseeable future

• Want to work in a GROWING environment, with STABLE income, Bonuses, and a great attitude!

• Want the opportunity to advance and learn more!



Some of the responsibilities that your position will include are:

Helpdesk (mostly escalations, but some basic if needed), cyber security related tasks/ audits, cloud hosting and virtualization (HyperV, SonicWall, VPN), MS365 management and automation, BCDR (Axcient), networking (Unifi, Sonicwall), IT projects, Servers maintenance (Windows only), scripts creation, testing new technology and other tasks related to IT.



IMPORTANT:

This position requires AT LEAST 2 years of MSP experience and at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory, or lead role. 100% clean background check, highly organized, technologically savvy, and can work diligently with little 
veral hiring steps will take place to verify the above requirements, including reference checking, employment verification, technical testing, and more.



Minimum technical level that you will need to be able to pass a test on:

• Explaining to a non-technical person what the "cloud" is

• Consulting with a new client on what BCDR solution you would recommend to an SMB, and why

• Explaining what the differences are between traditional anti-virus and XDR

• Creating a new Virtual Machine on Hyper-V host, from an ISO file located on a different computer on the network.

• Explaining the differences and commonalities between SharePoint and OneDrive.

• Creating an Intune policy that will install Firefox on an Azure-joined VM, and make Firefox the default browser, with the specific home page we'll provide to you during the test.

• Several other situational and technical questions.

• CCNA certificate candidates preferred but not required.



MORE DETAILS:

• A PRE-EMPLOYMENT BACKGROUND CHECK is performed (at our expense). You must have 100% clean background check. Please do not apply if you don't have 100% clean background check.

• Personality is KEY for us. We are looking for an easy-going, yet professional, friendly and HONEST person.

• You will be working from home. This means you must have a quiet work environment and no excessive background noise.

• FAST AND RELIABLE INTERNET SERVICE IS REQUIRED With at least 100Mbps download speed  20+Mbps upload speed.

• As part of this position requirement, you must have a computer that will be used exclusively for your work with us. This means we will be installing our security software on that computer, will remove admin rights from you, and monitor/ control it for security and compliance reasons. In return, we will pay you additional “rent” fees, on top of your salary, in the amount of several hundred dollars. Details about this “rental” will be discussed during your second interview. There are minimum requirements that your computer must have, in order to be employed with us. You must have a Computer/Laptop with at least i5 minimum 9th gen processor (preferably a newer one) with 16 GB RAM or more or Ryzen 5/7 (MUST include TPM support) as well as Windows 11 OS.

• You must have recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more.

• We evaluate/ review employees monthly and provide consistent feedback.

• We offer raises and bonuses according to performance, certifications, attitude, and customer reviews twice/ year.

• Your manager (our IT director) will create a roadmap for your "KPIs" and certifications track. We always push our team to earn certifications and additional knowledge – even allowing “disconnect study time” during business hours!

• On-call rotation (after-hours) for a week at a time, once every 4-5 weeks. It's VERY rare that we get calls after-hours (the average is only twice/ year!).

• We're closed on major US holidays, and at the completion of the first 3 months of employment, you'll qualify for paid holidays.

• Work hours are Mon-Fri at 8 am till 5:30 pm (UTC-07:00 , MST, Arizona time zone)

• Every 4 to 5 weeks, you'll be working 1/2 day on a Saturday (project work/catch-up work) and get 1/2 day off the week after

• Mandatory 1-hour lunch and additional breaks (as you need those) throughout the day.

• Further details and information will be discussed with qualified candidates.



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED:

• REQUIRED: Relevant minimum 2 YEARS experience working for an MSP

• REQUIRED: With AT LEAST 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role.

• REQUIRED: Microsoft Azure AD/ M365 experience

• REQUIRED: Experience working with an RMM and PSA software (DATTO preferred)

• Preferred: Cyber Security education/experience

• Preferred: Hyper-V experience



Other tools we use:

Barracuda DNS filter, AutoElevate, Cylance, Infocyte, Syxsense, IT Glue, SonicWall, Unifi, and more



HOW TO APPLY?



Answer the questions below, or you may also send an
 to 
 with the subject line "L2 Tech Support - Feb2026" with your answers:



- An attachment of your resume in PDF format/ link of you resume if you will send us a message.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you have a 100% clean background with no criminal history.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you understand the business hours (MST\ Arizona time zone.



Answer the following questions:

1. How many years of experience do you have working in an MSP company? Name of the MSP company/s you worked with.

2. Do you have at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role?

3. Do you have experience working with RMM and PSA software? What applications did you use?

4. Do you have experience working with Virtualization, servers, GPO, TCP/IP, hyper-v/vmware, conditional access, Intune, and Scripting such as PowerShell?

5. Have you recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more? What time zone and when?

6. Are you okay with the computer requirements and the rental arrangement described in the job details?

7. Do you have an internet speed of at least 100Mbps download speed and  20+ upload speed?



We're looking forward to having you join our family!

title: Senior Personal Assistant / Secretary
description:
25 APPLY POINTS REQUIRED FOR THIS JOB ROLE



SENIOR SENIOR APPLICANTS ONLY - WITH PREVIOUS EXPERIENCE 



====================================================================================================





Job Title: Senior Personal Assistant / Secretary

Company: Finance Software Firm

Employment Type: Full-Time

Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM

SALARY : $705.00 - $865.00 per month 



DEGREE HOLDER WITH PREVIOUS - EXPERIENCE



====================================================================================================







About Us

Role Overview

This position is ideal for someone who is driven, hardworking, and motivated to push themselves toward achieving their long-term career and personal goals.







====================================================================================================





Key Responsibilities



Provide high-level administrative support to senior executives



Manage complex calendars, meetings, and scheduling across multiple time zones



Handle correspondence,
s, and phone communications professionally and efficiently



Prepare reports, presentations, and documents with a high degree of accuracy



Organise travel arrangements, itineraries, and accommodations



Maintain confidential records and sensitive information with discretion



Act as a gatekeeper and liaison between executives and internal/external stakeholders



Ensure office operations run smoothly and efficiently



Anticipate needs and proactively solve problems before they arise

Strong written and verbal communication abilities

High level of professionalism and confidentiality

Self-motivated, disciplined, and highly reliable

Career progression opportunities



Supportive and high-performance work environment

 address.

title: Functional QA Specialist
description:
Apply here:  



We’re hiring Web Specialists to join our Grow implementation team. You’ll build and maintain client websites in Webflow and execute ongoing client edit requests — the day-to-day work that keeps hundreds of gym websites running cleanly and accurately.



This role requires strong Webflow proficiency, a good design eye, and the discipline to follow SOPs without cutting corners. This role isn’t creative design. It’s precise execution. The quality problem we’re solving is accuracy and judgment: making the right change the first time, every time.



What You’ll Do  



- Execute new gym websites in Webflow using automated build tooling

- Customize each site per client brief: colors, fonts, images, copy, and section layout

- Coordinate with QA before launch to catch issues before they reach clients

- Maintain build documentation and flag automation gaps

- Interpret client feedback and translate it accurately into Webflow changes

- Work through the edit queue efficiently without sacrificing accuracy

- Identify when a request is unclear and ask for clarification rather than guessing

- Maintain low rework rates — getting it right the first time



Quality and SOP Adherence  



- Follow documented SOPs for every task — no shortcuts

- Flag when SOPs are unclear or outdated rather than improvising

- Maintain clean files and naming conventions in Webflow



What We’re Looking For



Required  



- 2+ years hands-on Webflow experience — building and editing real client sites

- Strong design eye: you notice when something looks off and you know how to fix it

- Strong understanding of image and design best practices — including resolution standards, aspect ratios, composition, and optimization for web

- Familiarity with CMS platforms and content collections — you understand how CMS-driven pages are structured and can work confidently within them

- Well-versed in SEO/AEO best practices and on-page optimization — you understand how title tags, meta descriptions, and structured content affect search and AI-driven discovery

- Familiar with site speed analytics and web performance best practices — you know how to read performance data and identify what's slowing a site down

- Familiarity with Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and tag-based tracking basics — you can verify that analytics are firing correctly and understand what proper implementation looks like

- Ability to interpret client feedback accurately and make the change they meant, not just what they said

- Disciplined SOP adherence: you follow the process even on straightforward tasks

- Ability to read, interpret, and execute complex written instructions in English — you can follow detailed SOPs precisely and document your work clearly enough that nothing needs a follow-up conversation



Nice to Have  



- Experience with BugHerd or similar edit-tracking tools

- Familiarity with GoHighLevel or similar CRM platforms

- Prior experience in a structured SaaS implementation or client services team



Success in the First 6 Months  



- Your rework rate is below 2% and staying there

- You’re working through the edit queue with high accuracy and minimal escalations

- Your QA pass rate on site builds is above 95%

- You’ve flagged at least one SOP or automation gap that improved the team’s process



About PushPress  



PushPress is the AI-powered gym management platform built for boutique fitness.



We are transforming how boutique fitness owners operate and how the entire $100B global fitness industry connects, transacts, and grows. Trusted by more than 5,000 gyms and 500,000 members, PushPress processes ~$1B annually.



We're a Series B company backed by Altos Ventures, StepStone, and Mucker Capital, and we're going all-in on AI. Our AI Assistant, AI Member Intel, and AI-powered reporting tools are already changing how gym owners and coaches operate. We believe AI should make the human side of fitness better, not replace it.



By embedding intelligence directly into the product, we enable boutique fitness owners to make faster decisions, unlock new revenue streams, and collaborate across a connected network. As more gyms join the platform, data compounds, intelligence strengthens, and the value of the ecosystem increases for every owner.



We are a global team of builders, operators, and fitness fanatics on a mission to level the playing field for independent fitness entrepreneurs. If you are ready to help reshape an industry, let's talk!



Why Join PushPress  



- Work with a tight-knit team that moves fast and values quality

- Contractor role with competitive pay above PHL market average

- Clear standards and documented SOPs — no guessing what good looks like

- Direct exposure to AI-assisted tooling and modern automation workflows

- Opportunity to grow into QA, implementation ops, or senior web roles

- Real impact: hundreds of gym businesses rely on the work this team produces

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
**Please include a link to your CV/Resume when applying



Work Schedule: PST (Pacific Standard Time), 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM

Work Setup: 100% Remote

Salary Range: PHP 30,000 – PHP 50,000 per month (based on experience and performance)

About the Role



We are seeking a highly analytical and performance-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to fully own and scale our Google advertising ecosystem.



This role is strictly focused on Google Ads — including Search, Display, Performance Max, and remarketing. You will be directly accountable for improving ROAS, reducing CPA, and scaling profitable campaigns.



This is not a general digital marketing role. We are looking for someone who understands Google’s algorithm, bidding mechanics, intent-based targeting, and performance scaling at a strategic level.



What You’ll Do



Own Google Ads Performance



Architect, launch, and scale campaigns across:

- Google Search (Brand, Non-Brand, Competitor)

- Performance Max

- Display Network

- Remarketing campaigns



Build structured account frameworks aligned with business revenue goals.

Implement and optimize smart bidding strategies (tCPA, tROAS, Maximize Conversions, value-based bidding).

Drive Measurable Growth



Monitor campaign performance daily and take proactive optimization actions.

Continuously improve:

- ROAS

- Cost per Acquisition (CPA)

- Conversion rates

- Qualified lead or revenue generation



Conduct search term mining and negative keyword management.

Reallocate budgets toward top-performing campaigns.

Execute structured A/B testing of:

- Ad copy

- Landing page alignment

- Bid strategies

- Audience signals (for Performance Max)



Ensure Tracking & Attribution Accuracy



Oversee proper implementation of:

- GA4

- Google Tag Manager

- Conversion tracking

- Enhanced Conversions



Audit data accuracy and ensure reporting reflects real performance.

Align paid traffic performance with CRM and sales outcomes where applicable.

Own Reporting & Scaling Strategy



Deliver weekly performance summaries with clear action plans.

Develop performance forecasts and scaling projections.

Identify growth opportunities based on data trends and intent segmentation.

What We’re Looking For



Required Experience



4–6 years of hands-on Google Ads experience.

Proven track record managing and scaling monthly ad budgets.

Strong expertise in:

- Search intent targeting and keyword clustering

- Account structure strategy

- Performance Max campaign optimization

- Smart bidding and automation strategies

- Remarketing funnel strategies



Experience with GA4, Google Tag Manager, and advanced conversion tracking.

Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and drive decisions.

Experience improving ROAS and reducing CPA in a performance-driven environment.

Nice to Have



Experience in e-commerce or lead generation campaigns.

Experience working with high AOV or competitive markets.

Google Ads Certifications.

Experience with landing page CRO collaboration.

title: Real Estate Acquisitions (VA)
description:
Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist (Remote)



About Us

Price Real Estate Investments is a multi-market U.S. based real estate investment company focused on acquiring off-market properties directly from homeowners. We specialize in building strong relationships with sellers, negotiating with them, and closing deals virtually. Our team is fully remote, but our impact is nationwide — and we’re growing quickly.



We’re looking for an experienced Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist to join our acquisitions team. This role is critical to our business: you’ll be speaking directly with homeowners, negotiating terms, and guiding sellers through the contract signing process. If you’ve personally made offers to sellers and closed contracts over the phone, this is an opportunity to put your skills to work in a high-energy, professional environment.



Compensation

$10/hour USD base pay



Plus Monthly Contract Bonuses for getting offers accepted:

• Bronze: 2 signed contracts = $500 bonus

• Silver: 3 signed contracts = $1,000 bonus

• Gold: 4 signed contracts = $1,500 bonus

• Platinum: 5+ signed contracts = $2,000 bonus



On-target earnings can range from $2,500–$3,500+ per month depending on performance. Pay dates are on the 1st and 15th of each month.



We believe in rewarding results. Our top performers earn meaningful bonuses based on closed contracts and consistent production.



Schedule

Full-time, Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST

Remote position, work from your own secure setup



What You’ll Be Doing

- Engage with homeowners (seller leads), build authentic rapport, and manage conversations with professionalism

- Follow a proven acquisitions script while sounding natural and confident

- Ask strong follow-up questions to uncover seller motivation and property condition

- Make verbal offers, negotiate price and terms, and walk sellers through agreements using DocuSign

- Handle objections effectively and push deals forward toward signed contracts

- Maintain organized notes, offers, and seller updates in our CRM

- Collaborate closely with the acquisitions team and leadership



What It Takes to Succeed Here

- Relentless Follow-Up: Sellers don’t always respond the first time — or the second. You know how to stay persistent with calls, texts, and follow-ups until you get an answer. Nothing slips through the cracks on your watch.

- Extreme Attention to Detail: Every call, every note, every update gets logged correctly in the CRM. You don’t miss details, and you take pride in keeping your pipeline organized. If you’ve ever been called meticulous or “on top of everything,” this is where you’ll shine.

- Closer’s Mentality: You’re not just reading a script — you know how to listen, build rapport, and guide sellers toward a decision. You thrive on negotiation, handle objections with confidence, and create win-win agreements that get signed.

- Driven by Results: You measure success by contracts closed. You hold yourself to high standards and push to hit — and exceed — your targets consistently. You’re motivated by performance and driven by the satisfaction of closing successful deals.

- Resilient Problem-Solver: Whether it’s a tough seller, a pricing objection, or a complicated situation, you don’t freeze — you find solutions and move the deal forward. Challenges are part of the role, and you thrive in solving them under pressure.



Requirements

- Minimum 2+ years of experience in real estate acquisitions or seller negotiations

- Proven track record of closing real estate deals and securing signed contracts

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written)

- Confidence and professionalism on the phone; ability to build trust and rapport quickly

- Familiarity with real estate terms like ARV, repairs, inspection, contingencies, etc.

- Strong work ethic, coachability, and ability to follow scripts while sounding natural

- Proficiency with CRMs and outbound dialers

- Reliable high-speed internet, updated computer, and a quiet workspace



What We’re Looking For

- A confident, friendly, and persuasive communicator who thrives on results

- Someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and relentless in follow-up

- A professional with the drive to close contracts and grow with a fast-moving team



Why Join Us?

- Competitive pay with structured bonuses

- Real opportunities for growth in a professional investment company

- Work remotely with a team that supports your success

- A chance to close real deals, make a real impact, and develop long-term career skills in acquisitions



At Price Real Estate Investments, acquisitions is the heartbeat of our business. You’ll be in the front seat, driving growth and learning the strategies that power real deals across multiple U.S. markets.



How to Apply: (Read Carefully – Incomplete Applications Will Be Ignored)

-
 us at: 

- Subject line: Real Estate Acquisitions Application – OJPH

- Attach your resume with relevant real estate or sales experience

- Include a 1–2 minute audio or video introduction about yourself and experience.



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.

title: Influencer / UGC Talent Manager for UK brand
description:
Influencer & UGC Talent Manager - Full-Time, Remote (UK Supplements Brand)



Salary: $800-$1200 USD per month (depending on experience)

Payment: Weekly via Wise. Always on time.

Schedule: Monday-Friday, UK hours (3pm-11pm PHT), some flexibility possible.

Reports to: Marketing Director (company co-founder)



IMPORTANT: There is a required application instruction at the bottom. Please read before applying.



ABOUT US



UK direct-to-consumer supplements brand. 35+ natural products (collagen, biotin, menopause support, creatine, probiotics). Sold on Shopify and Amazon UK. Over 350,000 customers. Small remote-first team. Real established company, real revenue. We will share the brand name with shortlisted candidates.



THE ROLE



You will own our entire influencer and UGC pipeline: finding creators, outreach, seeding, negotiation, briefing, content management, whitelisting, and building long-term affiliate and ambassador relationships. Content is used in paid Meta ads and organic social. Everything must feel authentic and drive sales.



This is a specialised marketing role, not a general VA position.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



- Source and discover influencers and UGC creators using discovery tools (Modash, influencer databases, Instagram/TikTok search). Vet creators for fake followers, engagement quality, audience demographics, and brand fit before any outreach.

- Run personalised outreach via DM and
 on TikTok and Instagram (health, wellness, beauty, fitness niches). No copy-paste templates.

- Run product seeding campaigns, nurture relationships, and convert seeded creators into affiliates and brand ambassadors.

- Negotiate fees, deliverables, timelines, and content usage rights. Know when to seed, when to offer affiliate commission, and when to pay a flat fee.

- Send creative briefs from our team (hooks, talking points, format, tone, CTA, usage rights). Manage reviews and revisions. Deliver labelled content to the paid media team.

- Handle whitelisting for Meta partnership ads and account whitelisting. Coordinate permissions, troubleshoot issues, and work with our media buyer.

- Help manage our affiliate programme (Social Snowball or similar). Track referral codes, commissions, and performance.

- Maintain a clean tracker of all creators, briefs, spend, and results. Send weekly updates. Flag problems early without being asked.





REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- 1-2+ years in influencer marketing, UGC management, or creator partnerships (brand or agency side)

- Experience with seeding campaigns and converting creators into affiliates

- Experience with whitelisting / Meta partnership ads. 

- Experience with an affiliate platform (Social Snowball, Aspire, Grin, CreatorIQ, or similar)

- Experience working with creative briefs for performance-focused UGC and managing content contracts/usage rights

- Comfortable negotiating rates, deliverables, and timelines with creators

- Strong written English (you will write outreach, briefs, and negotiate with UK creators daily)

- Experience sourcing creators using discovery tools (Modash or similar) and vetting them for fake followers, engagement quality, and audience fit

- Highly organised, managing many creator relationships without dropping things

- Self-starter who works independently and flags issues proactively

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



NICE-TO-HAVE (WILL MAKE YOU STAND OUT)



- Health, beauty, wellness, or supplements industry experience

- Shopify familiarity



HOW TO APPLY



Start your application with the exact words: "I have read the full post - here is my application for the Influencer Manager role."



Then answer these (please number them 1-5):



1. Why are you a good fit for this specific role? (3-5 sentences, no generic cover letters.)

2. Your relevant influencer/UGC experience. Be specific: which brands or agencies? What did you do? How many creators? Have you run seeding campaigns and converted creators into affiliates?

3. Have you set up whitelisting and partnership ads for Meta? If yes, describe briefly. If no, say so.

4. Have you used Social Snowball, Aspire, Grin, or a similar affiliates platform? Which one, and for what?

5. Name 1-2 Instagram creators you think would suit a UK supplements brand selling collagen supplements (skin) and menopause supplements (hormonal health) to a mostly female 30-55 audience. Why?



Also include your expected monthly salary (PHP) and availability to start.



Applications without the confirmation phrase or that are clearly generic will not be reviewed. We read every application that follows the instructions.

title: Real Estate VA
description:
We’re hiring a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support a fast-growing Chicago real estate business focused on investors, lead generation, and database growth. This is not a listing role—your focus is CRM management, lead organization, and helping drive new opportunities.



Responsibilities include managing and cleaning our CRM, tagging and segmenting contacts, building outreach lists, and supporting
/text campaigns. You’ll track inbound leads, maintain notes, and ensure consistent follow-up. You may also assist with research (agents, properties, rent comps) and basic marketing support.



We’re looking for someone fast, organized, and reliable who can follow systems but also think proactively. Experience with CRMs, data entry, or marketing support is preferred. Real estate experience is a plus but not required.



Strong written English, attention to detail, and responsiveness are critical. This is a long-term role with growth potential.



To apply, please submit your resume and a short 1–2 minute video introducing yourself, your experience with CRM/data management, and an example of a system or process you’ve improved.

title: Customer Support Manager (Shopify - eCommerce)
description:
FULL-TIME, LONG-TERM, EXCLUSIVE ROLE ONLY

No part-time work, agency setups, or side commitments.



We are a fast-growing supplement brand looking for a Customer Support Manager who is genuinely obsessed with efficiency and continuous improvement. This is not a role for someone who just wants to maintain the status quo or follow a manual. We need a leader who looks at a process and immediately thinks of three ways to make it faster, smarter, and better.



You will be responsible for building and scaling our support operations. We want someone who takes deep pride in ownership, turns chaos into systems, and ensures our customer experience is a competitive advantage. If you are a builder who thrives on fixing broken workflows and implementing high-level strategy, we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do



* Optimize & Implement: You will be the architect of our CS roadmap, constantly auditing and improving systems to ensure we stay ahead of our growth.

* System Ownership: Beyond just managing tickets, you will create, improve, and maintain our entire library of SOPs, macros, and internal documentation.

* Problem Identification: You will proactively identify patterns in customer friction and work across departments to solve issues at the root.

* Tech Stack Management: Take full ownership of our tools (Gorgias, Shopify, etc.), ensuring all automations, rules, and integrations are running at peak performance.

* Accountability: Own the department KPIs (CSAT, Resolution Time, Efficiency) and use data to drive every decision you make.

* Hiring: Hire, promote, and remove underperformers to maintain a high-output, accountable team culture

* Lead by Example: Set the standard for communication and problem-solving, eventually leading the hiring and training as the team scales.



Qualifications



* 5+ years leading customer service teams of 15+ in a fast-paced eCommerce environment

* Obsession with Improvement: You must be able to demonstrate how you have personally improved a system, workflow, or department in a previous role.

* Shopify Expert: Strong hands-on experience with Shopify and its ecosystem of apps.

* Tool Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar platforms, specifically in building out automations and complex workflows.

* Strategic Thinker: Ability to translate raw data into actionable process changes.

* Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English with the ability to lead with authority and clarity.

* Commitment: Willingness to commit full-time and exclusively to our brand for the long term.



This Role is Not for You If:



* You view this as "just a job" rather than something you take personal pride in building

* You need step-by-step direction and shy away from strategic decisions

* You're uncomfortable holding people accountable or addressing underperformance

* You present problems instead of solving them

* You want a comfortable, predictable 9-to-5 job



Click here to apply :

title: Hybrid Project Manager & Graphic Designer
description:
Overview

We are seeking a Hybrid Graphic Design Project Manager who can bridge the gap between organized project management and creative execution. You will be the primary point of contact for clients, turning their visions—specifically for projects like custom event bags—into high-quality visual reality.



Key Responsibilities

Client Management: Act as the main point of contact; manage expectations and maintain clear communication throughout the project lifecycle.



Creative Execution: Use your design expertise to create customized artwork tailored to specific client needs.



Project Oversight: Develop and manage timelines, budgets, and project plans to ensure on-time delivery.



Internal Coordination: Align with internal teams to ensure design objectives are met.



Quality Assurance: Perform rigorous checks on all deliverables to ensure they meet client specifications and brand standards.



Reporting: Prepare progress reports for stakeholders and proactively solve project bottlenecks.



Essential Qualifications

Education: Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Project Management, or a related field.



Software Mastery: Strong proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) or Sketch.



Experience: 3–5 years in a PM role, ideally within a creative or design agency.

Organization: Proven ability to juggle multiple projects without losing track of details.



Salary & Benefits

Competitive Salary: Paid in U.S. Dollars ($); commensurate with your experience.



Health Benefits: Comprehensive health insurance package.



Future Security: Retirement savings plan with a company match.



Work-Life Balance: Paid time off (PTO), holidays, and a flexible hybrid work environment.



Growth: Professional development and training opportunities.

title: Call Center Manager
description:
Job Title: Team Leader / Supervisor – Call Center Operations



Job Summary:

We are seeking an experienced and motivated Call Center Team Leader / Supervisor to oversee daily operations and manage a team of customer service representatives. The ideal candidate will possess strong leadership skills, excellent English communication abilities, and a proven track record of coaching, training, and developing tea
mbers. This role requires a proactive problem solver who understands call center performance metrics and can drive team performance through KPI management and effective leadership.



Key Responsibilities:



Lead, supervise, and support a team of 8 or more call center representatives to ensure high levels of performance and customer satisfaction.



Monitor daily team activities including call handling, productivity, and service quality.



Track, analyze, and report on Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) and scorecards to ensure team goals and company standards are consistently met.



Provide ongoing coaching, mentoring, and training to tea
mbers to improve performance and professional development.



Identify operational challenges and implement effective problem-solving strategies to improve workflow and team productivity.



Conduct regular performance reviews, feedback sessions, and one-on-one meetings with tea
mbers.



Ensure adherence to company policies, call center procedures, and customer service standards.



Use Google Workspace (Google Docs, Sheets, Slides) or Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) to maintain reports, track metrics, and communicate team performance.



Collaborate with management and other departments to implement improvements in processes and service delivery.



Assist with onboarding and training of new employees.



Required Qualifications:



Excellent English communication skills (both written and verbal).



Proven experience managing or supervising a team of 8 or more employees.



Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities.



Proficiency in Google Workspace or Microsoft Office tools.



Solid understanding of call center KPIs, performance metrics, and scorecards.



Demonstrated experience training, coaching, and leading tea
mbers.



Preferred Skills:



Strong leadership and interpersonal skills.



Ability to motivate and develop high-performing teams.



Strong organizational and time management skills.



Experience working in a fast-paced call center environment.

title: Appointment Setter / Sales Closer (UK Legal Leads)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a confident and professional Appointment Setter / Sales Closer to speak with inbound leads for UK-based law firms.

These are warm leads who have already shown interest in legal services (e.g. divorce, family law, conveyancing, immigration). Your role is to guide them, build trust, and move them to the next step in the process.

This is not cold calling. You will be speaking to people who have already enquired.

What You’ll Be Doing

Calling and speaking with inbound leads (no cold calling)

Understanding their situation and asking the right questions

Building trust and making the lead feel comfortable

Clearly explaining the next steps in the process

Booking qualified appointments or helping move the lead forward

Following a structured call framework (training provided)

Handling basic objections and keeping control of the conversation

Updating notes and outcomes in the CRM



What We’re Looking For

Strong spoken English with a clear British Accent

Confident on the phone and able to guide conversations

Experience in sales, appointment setting, and closing

Ability to build rapport quickly with different types of people

Calm and professional, especially in sensitive conversations

Good listening skills (not just talking)

Reliable, organised, and consistent



Bonus (not required):

Experience working with UK, US, or Australian clients

Background in legal, real estate, or high-trust industries

Experience handling inbound leads

Important Notes About the Role

You will be speaking with people going through important life situations (e.g. divorce, property, immigration)

Professionalism, empathy, and clarity are essential

This is a performance-based role — results matter

Pay Structure

Base salary: $650/month

Commission paid based on performance:

Per qualified appointment booked

Additional bonuses for high performance

(Details will be discussed during the interview)

Working Hours

Must be available during UK business hours

Full-time preferred



How to Apply

Please include:

A short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself

Your experience in sales or calling roles

Any results you’ve achieved (appointments booked, deals closed, etc.)

Optional (this is important — add this filter at the end)

To filter out weak applicants, add:

At the top of your application, please write: “I am confident speaking with inbound leads.”

title: Jr. Account Executive | Remote | U.S. Mortgage Company
description:
Jr. Account Executive | Remote | U.S. Mortgage Company



Job Type: Full-Time | Remote

Experience Level: Entry-Level (with or without experience)

Base pay of Php 19,715.00 – Php 28,600.00 + performance-based incentives



We are a growing U.S.-based mortgage company looking for a Jr. Account Executive to join our team. This role is ideal for fresh graduates or early-career professionals who are highly organized, detail-oriented, and eager to build a long-term career in the U.S. mortgage industry.



You will work closely with our Account Executives, underwriting team, and broker partners to help manage loan files, follow up on documents, and ensure smooth coordination from submission to funding. This is a great opportunity to gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced and rewarding environment.



> Key Responsibilities



Assist brokers and loan processors in collecting, reviewing, and organizing borrower documents

Coordinate with brokers, processors, and internal teams throughout the loan process

Follow up on missing documents, conditions, and outstanding requirements

Upload and manage files in the loan origination system

Ensure all documents are complete, accurate, and properly labeled

Maintain file notes, status updates, and internal records

Perform data entry and general administrative support tasks

Communicate updates between underwriting, processing, sales teams, and broker partners

Help keep loan files on track to meet turnaround timelines



> Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business, or related field is a plus but not required

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Excellent written and verbal English communication

Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment

Basic knowledge of Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

Willingness to learn U.S. mortgage processes (training will be provided)



> Specific Requirements



Reliable high-speed internet connection

Backup internet or data plan (mobile hotspot or secondary ISP)

Quiet and professional work environment

Willingness to work full-time during U.S. business hours (PST)



> Nice to Have



Experience in BPO, admin work, customer service, or mortgage-related roles

Familiarity with U.S. mortgage terms and loan process

Experience working with brokers, processors, or document-heavy accounts

Experience as a cold caller or handling outbound calls (strong follow-up and communication skills preferred)



> Why join us?



Base pay of Php 19,715 – Php 28,600 (with salary progression) + performance-based incentives

Opportunity to enter and grow in the U.S. mortgage industry

Paid training and continuous support provided

Supportive and collaborative team environment

Long-term remote role with career growth potential

Exposure to real-world U.S. mortgage operations



> How to Apply



Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and follow the instructions below carefully.



Submit your updated resume (PDF or link — Google Drive/Dropbox/OLJ profile)

If submitting a link, make sure it is set to “Anyone with the link can view”

Include your relevant experience (Mortgage, Real Estate, Admin, BPO, or Customer Service)

Include your expected monthly salary (PHP)

Include your earliest start date or availability



Important



Start your application with this exact line: “I have read the job post from beginning to end.”



Shortlisted Candidates



Will be asked to submit a speedtest (Atleast 100 MBPS required; screenshot from speedtest.net)

Will provide computer specifications (16 GB RAM and processor)

Will answer short scenario-based questions



Note



Only applicants who follow the instructions above will be prioritized for review



We are looking for reliable and motivated individuals who are serious about building a long-term career in the mortgage industry. If that sounds like you, apply now. We review applications daily.
